local bjc=((bja-bjb)+biz)+biy biv[biz*131071+biy]=bjc return bjc end bix=0 biu=bix biy=bix biy=biy*21+(13337) biu=biu+(biv[491676*131071+biy] or biw(491676,896,3167)) while biu~=437567 do if biu==502756 then bix=biv[biy*131071+34] or biu biu=bix[15431] elseif biu==502742 then return bfa:BF01(bfb,...) else biy=0 biu=502756 end end end bfb[1][20]=function(...) local bjd,bje,bjf,bjg,bjh bje={} bjf=function(bji,bjj,bjk) local bjl=((bjj-bjk)+bji)+bjh bje[bji*131071+bjh]=bjl return bjl end bjg=0 bjd=bjg bjh=bjg bjh=bjh*7+(44460) bjd=bjd+(bje[466868*131071+bjh] or bjf(466868,2637,3477)) repeat if bjd==510488 then return bfa:B49C(bfb,...) elseif bjd==510507 then bjg=bje[bjh*131071+8] or bjd bjd=bjg[14361] else bjh=0 bjd=510507 end until bjd==446735 end bfi[20]={} bfb[1][92][6]=rawset bfi[21]=setfenv local byd=byc[3] local bye=byc[2] if byc[1]==1 then bya[byb]=bvj[bye] else local byf=brv[bye] if byd==0 and byf~=nil and byf[2]~=nil then local byg=byf[2] local byh=byf[3] local byi=byf[1] if(byi==0 or byi==1) and byh~=nil then byf=byg[byh] else byf=byi[byg] end end bya[byb]=byf end end bvj[bxp]=brs:IN(brt,bxx,bya,brw) end end else if bvk>=brt[1][72][2] then if bvk<=brt[1][72][2] then bvj[bvd[bsn]]=bvj[bvd[bsm]]<bvj[bvd[bso]];else local byj=bvd[bsn] local byk=bvp local byl=byk+1 local bym=bwc local byn=bwa[byl] local byo=bvu(bvt,byn(brs:UNCE3(brt,bwa,byl+1,bym))) bvh=byj+byo-1 for byp=1,byo do bvj[byj+byp-1]=bvt[byp] end bwc=byk local byq=bvz[bvi] bvi=bvi-1 bvp=byq or 0 end else if bvk<=brt[1][104][2] then if bvk>=brt[1][104][2] then local byr=bvd[bsn] local bys=bwa[bwc] local byt=bwa[bwc-1] bwc=bwc-brt[1][3][3] local byu,byv=byt(bys) do local byw,byx=byu,byv bvj[byr]=byw bvj[byr+1]=byx end else bvo=#bvo end else local byy=bvd[bsn] local byz=bsh[bvd[bsq]] local bza=bvj[byy] local bzb=bza[byz] local bzc=bvu(bvt,bzb(bza,bvj[byy+brt[1][3][3]])) bvh=byy+bzc-1 for bzd=1,bzc do bvj[byy+bzd-1]=bvt[bzd] end end end end end else if bvk>=brt[1][65][6] then if bvk<=brt[1][60][7] then if bvk>=brt[1][9][4] then if bvk>=130 then if bvk>=brt[1][60][7] then bvj[(bvd[bso]-bvd[bsq])]=bvj[bvd[bsn]][bvj[(bvd[bsm]+bvd[bsq])]];else if bvk<=130 then for bze=bwb,1,-1 do local bzf=bvr[bze] local bzg=bvq[bzf] if bzg and bzf>=0 then local bzh=bzg[1] if bzh==0 then if bzg[2]==bvj then bzg[1]=1 bzg[2]={bvj[bzf]} bzg[3]=1 end else if bzh==bvj then bzg[1]={bvj[bzf]} bzg[2]=1 end end end bvq[bzf]=nil bvr[bze]=nil end bwb=0 local bzi=bvd[bsm] local bzj=bzi-1 local bzk=bwc-bzj+1 bwc=bzk-1 return brs:UNCE3(brt,bwa,bzk,bzk+bzj-1) else bvj[bvd[bsn]]=bsh[bvd[bsm]];end end else if bvk>=128 then if bvk<=128 then bvo=bvo+bvj[bvd[bsm]] else bvj[bvd[bsn]]=bvj[bvd[bsm]][bvj[(bvd[bso]+bvd[bsq])]];end else if bvk>=127 then bvj[(bvd[bsn]-bvd[bsq])]=bvj[brs:BIAC3(brt,bvd[bsm],brs:BIAC3(brt,bse[bve-1][bsm],(bve+bvd[bsq])))][bvj[bvd[bso]]];else if bvk<=brt[1][9][4] then bvj[bvd[bsn]]=bsn;else bvo=bvo-bvj[bvd[bsm]] end end end end else if bvk>=brt[1][15][4] then if bvk<=brt[1][34] then if bvk>=brt[1][34] then local bzl=bwa[bwc] local bzm=bwa[bwc-1] local bzn=bwa[bwc-brt[1][3][3]] bwc=bwc-brt[1][92][10] bvj[bvd[bsn]]=bzn(bzm,bzl) else if bvj[bvd[bsn]]==nil or bvj[bvd[bsn]]==false then bve=bvd[bsm];end;end else if bvk<=brt[1][3][9] then local bzo=bvd[bsn] local bzp=bwa[bwc] local bzq=bwa[bwc-1] local bzr=bwa[bwc-brt[1][3][3]] bwc=bwc-brt[1][92][10] do local bzs,bzt=bzr(bzq,bzp) bvj[bzo]=bzs bvj[bzo+1]=bzt end else bvj[(bvd[bsn]-bvd[bsq])]=bvj[bvd[bsm]];end end else if bvk>=119 then if bvk>=brt[1][55][2] then bvj[bvd[bsn]][bvj[(bvd[bsm]+bvd[bsq])]]=bvj[bvd[bso]];else bvj[(bvd[bsn]-bvd[bsq])]={};end else if bvk<=brt[1][65][6] then bvj[(bvd[bsm]+bvd[bsq])]=bvj[bvd[bso]][bvj[bvd[bsn]]];else bvj[bvd[bsn]]=bvj[(bvd[bsm]+bvd[bsq])];end end end end else if bvk<=brt[1][41] then if bvk<=139 then if bvk>=137 then if bvk>=139 then if not(bvj[bvd[bsn]]~=nil and bvj[bvd[bsn]]~=false) then bve=bse[bve][bsm];end;else if bvk<=137 then bvj[bvd[bsn]]=bsh[bvd[bsm]];else brw[bsh[bvd[bsm]]]=bvo end end else if bvk>=brt[1][19][6] then local bzu=(bvd[bsm]==0) and bvh or(bvd[bsn]+bvd[bsm]-1) local bzv=bwc+1 for bzw=bvd[bsn],bzu do bwa[bzv]=bvj[bzw] bzv=bzv+1 end bwc=bzv-1 else if bvk>=135 then local bzx=bsh[bvd[bsq]] local bzy=bvj[bvd[bsn]] while brt[1][75][3] do bvj[bvd[bsn]]=bzy[bzx](bzy,bvj[bvd[bsn]+brt[1][3][3]]) break end else bvj[bvd[bsn]]=bvj[(bvd[bsm]+bvd[bsq])][bvj[bvd[bso]]];end end end else if bvk>=143 then if bvk>=brt[1][41] then local bzz=#bvd[bsn];while brt[1][19][1] do for caa=1,bzz do bvj[bvd[bsn][caa]]=nil;end break end else if bvk<=143 then local cab=bvd[bsn] local cac=bvd[bsm] local cad=bvd[bso] local cae=bvd[bsq] local caf=bvj[cac] local cag=bvj[cad] local cah=bvj[cae] bvj[cab]=caf(cag,cah) else bvj[(bvd[bsn]-bvd[bsq])][bvj[bvd[bsm]]]=bvj[bvd[bso]];end end else if bvk<=141 then if bvk>=141 then bvj[bvd[bsn]]=bsh[bvd[bsm]];else local cai=bvd[bsn] local caj=bwa[bwc] local cak=bwa[bwc-1] bwc=bwc-brt[1][3][3] local cal=bvu(bvt,cak(caj)) bvh=cai+cal-1 for cam=1,cal do bvj[cai+cam-1]=bvt[cam] end end else local can=bvd[bsn] local cao=bvd[bsm] local cap=bsh[bvd[bsq]] local caq=bvj[can] local car=caq[cap] local cas=can+cao-1 bvj[can]=car(caq,brs:UNCE3(brt,bvj,can+brt[1][3][3],cas)) end end end else if bvk>=153 then if bvk>=157 then if bvk>=brt[1][23][3] then if bvk>=brt[1][77] then local cat=bvd local cau=cat[bsn][1] local cav=cat[bso][1] local caw,cax,cay=bvj[cau],bvj[cau+1],bvj[cau+brt[1][3][3]] while caw<=cax do bvj[cau]=caw bvj[cau+brt[1][92][10]]=caw bvj[cat[bsn][2]]=bvj[cat[bsm][2]] local caz,cba=bvj[cat[bsm][3]],cat[bsn][3];bvj[cba+1]=caz;bvj[cba]=caz[bsh[cat[bso][3]]] bvo=bvj[cat[bsn][4]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvo bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvj[cat[bsn][6]] bvj[cat[bsn][7]]=bsh[cat[bsm][7]] bvo=bvj[cat[bsn][8]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvo local cbb=cat[bsn][10] local cbc=bwa[bwc] local cbd=bwa[bwc-1] local cbe=bwa[bwc-brt[1][3][3]] bwc=bwc-brt[1][92][10] bvj[cbb]=cbe(cbd,cbc) bvj[cat[bsn][11]]=bvj[cat[bsm][11]] local cbf,cbg=bvj[cat[bsm][12]],cat[bsn][12];bvj[cbg+1]=cbf;bvj[cbg]=cbf[bsh[cat[bso][12]]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvj[cat[bsn][13]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvj[cat[bsn][14]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvj[cat[bsn][15]] bvj[cat[bsn][16]]={} bvj[cat[bsn][17]]=bsh[cat[bsm][17]] bvj[cat[bsn][18]][bvj[cat[bsm][18]]]=bvj[cat[bso][18]] bvj[cat[bsn][19]]=bsh[cat[bsm][19]] bvj[cat[bsn][20]]={} bvj[cat[bsn][21]][bvj[cat[bsm][21]]]=bvj[cat[bso][21]] bvj[cat[bsn][22]]=bsh[cat[bsm][22]] bvj[cat[bsn][23]]=bvj[cat[bsm][23]][bvj[cat[bso][23]]] bvj[cat[bsn][24]][bvj[cat[bsm][24]]]=bvj[cat[bso][24]] bvj[cat[bsn][25]]=bsh[cat[bsm][25]] bvj[cat[bsn][26]][bvj[cat[bsm][26]]]=bvj[cat[bso][26]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvj[cat[bsn][27]] local cbh=bwa[bwc] local cbi=bwa[bwc-1] local cbj=bwa[bwc-brt[1][3][3]] local cbk=bwa[bwc-brt[1][92][10]] bwc=bwc-brt[1][39][3] cbk(cbj,cbi,cbh) caw=caw+cay end bvj[cau]=caw bve=cat[bsm][1] else local cbl=bsi[bvd[bsq]] local cbm=cbl[1]-1 local cbn=bwa[bwc] local cbo=bwa[bwc-1] bwc=bwc-brt[1][3][3] local cbp,cbq=cbo(cbn) do local cbr,cbs=cbp,cbq bvj[cbm]=cbr bvj[cbm+1]=cbs end end else if bvk<=157 then bvj[bvd[bsn]]=brs:BIECC(brt,bvj[bvd[bsm]],bvj[bvd[bso]]);else bvj[bvd[bsn]]=bvj[bvd[bsm]]<=bvj[bvd[bso]];end end else if bvk<=brt[1][50][2] then if bvk<=153 then local cbt=bve local cbu=bvd if cbu[bsq]==brt[1][1] then bvj[cbu[bsn]]=not bvj[cbu[bsm]];else if cbu[bsq]==brt[1][104][6] then bvj[cbu[bsn]]=bvj[cbu[bsm]][bvj[cbu[bso]]];else if cbu[bsq]==brt[1][4][5] then bvj[cbu[bsn]]=bsh[cbu[bsm]];end end end local cbv=bse[cbt+1] if cbv[bsq]==225 then bvj[cbv[bsn]]=brw[bsh[cbv[bsm]]];else if cbv[bsq]==brt[1][7][4] then bvj[cbv[bsn]]=bvj[cbv[bsm]];else if cbv[bsq]==188 then bvj[cbv[bsn]][bvj[cbv[bsm]]]=bvj[cbv[bso]];end end end bve=bve+1 else bvj[(bvd[bsn]-bvd[bsq])]=bvj[brs:BIAC3(brt,bvd[bsm],brs:BIAC3(brt,bse[bve-1][bsm],(bve+bvd[bsq])))];end else if bvk<=brt[1][107][5] then bve=bvj[bvd[bsn]];else bvj[bvd[bsn]]=brt[10](1,...) end end end else if bvk>=brt[1][44][4] then if bvk>=151 then if bvk<=151 then bvj[bvd[bsn]]=bvj[bvd[bsm]];else local cbw=bsh[bvd[bsq]] local cbx=bvj[bvd[bsn]] local cby=cbx[cbw] local cbz=bvu(bvt,cby(cbx,bvj[bvd[bsn]+brt[1][3][3]])) bvh=bvd[bsn]+cbz-1 for cca=1,cbz do bvj[bvd[bsn]+cca-1]=bvt[cca] end end else if bvk<=brt[1][44][4] then local ccb=bvd[bsm] bvj[bvd[bsn]]=brv[ccb] else bvj[bvd[bsn]]=-bvj[(bvd[bsm]+bvd[bsq])];end end else if bvk>=brt[1][64] then local ccc=bvj[bvd[bsn]] if not ccc then bve=bvd[bsm];end;else if bvk>=brt[1][4][6] then bvj[bvd[bsn]]=bvj[bvd[bsm]]>=bvj[bvd[bso]];else bvj[(bvd[bsn]-bvd[bsq])]=-bvj[bvd[bsm]];end end end end end end else if bvk>=brt[1][97][4] then if bvk<=brt[1][76] then if bvk>=brt[1][44][8] then if bvk<=brt[1][44][8] then local ccd=bwa[bwc] local cce=bwa[bwc-1] bwc=bwc-brt[1][3][3] cce(ccd) else bvo=bvo%bvj[bvd[bsm]] end else if bvk<=brt[1][7][4] then if bvk<=brt[1][97][4] then bvo=-bvo else bvj[bvd[bsn]]=brs:BIAC3(brt,bvj[bvd[bsm]],bvj[bvd[bso]]);end else local ccf=bvd[bsn] local ccg=bsh[bvd[bsq]] local cch=bvj[ccf] bvj[ccf]=cch[ccg](cch,bvj[ccf+brt[1][3][3]],bvj[ccf+brt[1][92][10]]) end end else if bvk<=brt[1][19][7] then if bvk<=brt[1][65][2] then if bvk>=brt[1][65][2] then local cci=bvd[bsn] local ccj=bwc local cck=bvp local ccl=cck+1 local ccm=bwa[ccl] ccm(brs:UNCE3(brt,bwa,ccl+1,ccj)) bwc=cck local ccn=bvz[bvi] bvi=bvi-1 bvp=ccn or 0 else bvj[bse[bve][bsn]]=bvj[bse[bve][bsm]];end else local cco,ccp=bvd[bsn],bvd[bsm] local ccq=bsg[ccp] bvj[cco]=brs:IN(brt,ccq,nil,brw) end else if bvk<=brt[1][44][1] then bvo=brw[bsh[bvd[bsm]]] else local ccr=bwa[bwc] local ccs=bwa[bwc-1] local cct=bwa[bwc-brt[1][3][3]] local ccu=bwa[bwc-brt[1][92][10]] bwc=bwc-brt[1][39][3] bvj[bvd[bsn]]=ccu(cct,ccs,ccr) end end end else if bvk<=brt[1][114] then if bvk<=brt[1][13][5] then if bvk>=brt[1][13][5] then bvj[(bvd[bsn]-bvd[bsq])]=bvo else if bvk>=brt[1][93] then local ccv=bvd[bsn] local ccw=bvd[bsm] local ccx=ccw local ccy=bwc local ccz=ccy-ccx+1 local cda=bwa[ccz] cda(brs:UNCE3(brt,bwa,ccz+1,ccy)) bwc=ccz-1 else local cdb,cdc=bvd[bsn],(bvd[bso]*brt[1][13][5]) local cdd=bvj[cdb] for cde=1,bvh-cdb do cdd[cdc+cde]=bvj[cdb+cde] end end end else if bvk<=101 then local cdf=bvd[bsn] local cdg=bwa[bwc] bwc=bwc-1 bvj[cdf]=cdg() else do for cdh=bwb,1,-1 do local cdi=bvr[cdh] local cdj=bvq[cdi] if cdj then local cdk=cdj[1] if cdk==0 then if cdj[2]==bvj then cdj[1]=1 cdj[2]={cdj[2][cdj[3]]} cdj[3]=1 end else if cdk==bvj then cdj[1]={cdj[1][cdj[2]]} cdj[2]=1 end end end bvq[cdi]=nil bvr[cdh]=nil end bwb=0 local cdl=bwa[bwc] local cdm=bwa[bwc-1] bwc=bwc-brt[1][3][3] return cdm(cdl) end end end else if bvk<=brt[1][57] then if bvk>=brt[1][57] then local cdn=bsi[bvd[bsq]] local cdo=cdn[1]-1 local cdp=bwa[bwc] local cdq=bwa[bwc-1] bwc=bwc-brt[1][3][3] bvj[cdo]=cdq(cdp) else do while brt[1][55][3] do for cdr=bwb,1,-1 do local cds=bvr[cdr] local cdt=bvq[cds] if cdt then local cdu=cdt[1] if cdu==0 then if cdt[2]==bvj then cdt[1]=1 cdt[2]={cdt[2][cdt[3]]} cdt[3]=1 end else if cdu==bvj then cdt[1]={cdt[1][cdt[2]]} cdt[2]=1 end end end bvq[cds]=nil bvr[cdr]=nil end break end bwb=0 local cdv=bwa[bwc] local cdw=bwa[bwc-1] local cdx=bwa[bwc-brt[1][3][3]] bwc=bwc-brt[1][92][10] return cdx(cdw,cdv) end end else if bvk<=brt[1][13][4] then local cdy=bvd[bsn] local cdz=bwa[bwc] local cea=bwa[bwc-1] local ceb=bwa[bwc-brt[1][3][3]] bwc=bwc-brt[1][92][10] local cec=bvu(bvt,ceb(cea,cdz)) bvh=cdy+cec-1 for ced=1,cec do bvj[cdy+ced-1]=bvt[ced] end else local cee=bvd[bsn] local cef=bsh[bvd[bsq]] local ceg=bvj[cee] local ceh=ceg[cef] bvj[cee]=ceh(ceg) end end end end end end else if bvk<=brt[1][95][6] then if bvk<=brt[1][81] then if bvk>=brt[1][92][10] then if bvk<=brt[1][39][3] then if bvk<=brt[1][92][10] then local cei=bvd[bsn] local cej=bvj[cei] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=cej else bvj[bvd[bsn]][bvj[bvd[bsm]]]=bvj[bvd[bso]];end else if bvk<=brt[1][28][1] then bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvo else bve=bvd[bsm];end end else if bvk<=0 then bvj[bvd[bsn]]=bsh[bvd[bsm]];else if bvk>=brt[1][3][3] then bvo=bvj[bvd[bsn]] else bvj[bvd[bsn]]=bvj[bvd[bsm]][bvj[bvd[bso]]];end end end else if bvk<=15 then if bvk<=10 then if bvk<=brt[1][11][2] then if bvk<=brt[1][56][4] then bvj[bvd[bsn]]=brw[bsh[bvd[bsm]]];else bvj[bvd[bsn]]=bve+bvd[bsm];end else if bvk>=10 then local cek=#bvd[bsn];for cel=1,cek do bvj[bvd[bsn][cel]]=bsh[bvd[bsm][cel]];end else bvj[bvd[bsn]]=bvj[bvd[bsm]]+bvj[bvd[bso]];end end else if bvk<=brt[1][30][3] then if bvk>=brt[1][30][3] then else if bvk<=11 then local cem=bvd[bsm] bvj[bvd[bsn]]=brv[cem] else local cen=bvd[bsn] local ceo=bvd[bsm] local cep=bvj[cen] if not cep then bve=ceo;end;end end else if bvk>=15 then local ceq=bvd[bsm] local cer=bsh[ceq] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=cer else bvj[bvd[bsn]]=bvj[bvd[bsm]]-bvj[bvd[bso]];end end end else if bvk<=23 then if bvk<=brt[1][35][1] then if bvk<=brt[1][104][3] then if bvk>=brt[1][104][3] then return else bvj[bvd[bsn]]=bvj[bvd[bsm]];end else if bvk<=brt[1][55][6] then local ces=bvd[bsn] local cet=bvj[bvd[bsm]] local ceu=bvd[bso] local cev=ceu%brt[1][39][3] local cew=(ceu-cev)/brt[1][39][3] local cex=bvd[bsq] local cey if cev<1 then cey=(cew+cet-cex-bve)%brt[1][116][2] else if cev<brt[1][3][3] then cey=(cex+cet-bve-cew)%brt[1][116][2] else if cev>=brt[1][92][10] then cey=(cex*(cew+cet-bve))%brt[1][116][2] else cey=((cet*cew)-(bve*cew)+cex)%brt[1][116][2] end end end if cey<16057 then if cey<brt[1][2][7] then if cey==brt[1][88][2] then bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvj[ces] else bve=bse[cey][bvd[bsm]]+bvd[bsq] end else if cey<8111 then if cey==brt[1][2][7] then bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bsh[ces] else bvd=bse[cey] bve=bvd[bvd[bso]] end else if cey==8111 then bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvo else bvd=bse[cey] bve=bvd[bvd[bso]] end end end else if cey==16057 then bvj[ces]=bwa[bwc] bwa[bwc]=nil bwc=bwc-1 else bve=bse[cey][bvd[bsm]]+bvd[bsq] end end else local cez,cfa=bvj[bvd[bsm]],bvd[bsn];bvj[cfa+1]=cez;bvj[cfa]=cez[bsh[bvd[bso]]];end end else if bvk>=22 then if bvk>=23 then local cfb=bvd[bsm] local cfc=brv[cfb] bvj[bvd[bsn]]=cfc[1] else bvj[bvd[bsn]]={};end else if bvk>=21 then local cfd=bvd[bsn] local cfe=bwa[bwc] local cff=bwa[bwc-1] bwc=bwc-brt[1][3][3] cff(cfe) else for cfg=1,brt[13](bvm,bvl) do bvj[cfg]=bvn[cfg];end end end end else if bvk>=brt[1][5][5] then if bvk>=36 then if bvk>=38 then if bvk<=38 then local cfh=bvd[bsn] bvj[cfh]={bvj[cfh]} else local cfi,cfj=bvd[bsn],bvd[bsm] local cfk=bsi[cfj] local cfl={} for cfm=1,#cfk,brt[1][3][3] do cfl[bsh[cfk[cfm]]]=bsh[cfk[cfm+1]] end bvj[cfi]=cfl end else if bvk>=brt[1][108][1] then bvj[bvd[bsn]]=bvo else bvj[bvd[bsn]][1]=bvj[bvd[bsm]] end end else if bvk>=brt[1][5][2] then if bvk<=brt[1][5][2] then if bvj[bvd[bsn]] then bve=bvd[bsm];end;else local cfn=bvd[bsn] local cfo=bwa[bwc] local cfp=bwa[bwc-1] local cfq=bwa[bwc-brt[1][3][3]] bwc=bwc-brt[1][92][10] bvj[cfn]=cfq(cfp,cfo) end else if bvk<=brt[1][56][5] then if bvk>=brt[1][56][5] then local cfr=bvd[bsn] local cfs=bvd[bsm] local cft=bwc local cfu=cfs local cfv=cft-cfu+1 local cfw=bwa[cfv] bvj[cfr]=cfw(brs:UNCE3(brt,bwa,cfv+1,cft)) bwc=cfv-1 else bvj[bvd[bsn]]=bse end else bvj[bvd[bsn]]=bsm;end end end else if bvk>=brt[1][30][4] then if bvk>=brt[1][105][2] then local cfx=bvd[bsn] for cfy=1,#cfx do local cfz=bvj[cfx[cfy]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=cfz end else if bvk<=brt[1][30][4] then local cga=bvd[bsn] local cgb=bwa[bwc] local cgc=bwa[bwc-1] bwc=bwc-brt[1][3][3] bvj[cga]=cgc(cgb) else local cgd=bvd[bsn] local cge=bwa[bwc] local cgf=bwa[bwc-1] local cgg=bwa[bwc-brt[1][3][3]] local cgh=bwa[bwc-brt[1][92][10]] bwc=bwc-brt[1][39][3] bvj[cgd]=cgh(cgg,cgf,cge) end end else if bvk<=brt[1][61] then if bvk<=brt[1][8] then bvj[bvd[bsn]]=bvd[bsm];else local cgi=bwa[bwc] local cgj=bwa[bwc-1] local cgk=bwa[bwc-brt[1][3][3]] bwc=bwc-brt[1][92][10] cgk(cgj,cgi) end else if bvk<=brt[1][9][5] then local cgl=bvd[bsn] local cgm=bsh[bvd[bsq]] local cgn=bvj[cgl] bvj[cgl]=cgn[cgm](cgn,bvj[cgl+brt[1][3][3]]) else local cgo=bvd[bsm] for cgp=1,#cgo do local cgq=cgo[cgp] local cgr=bsh[cgq] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=cgr end end end end end end end end else if bvk>=brt[1][111][1] then if bvk<=65 then if bvk<=brt[1][11][6] then if bvk<=56 then if bvk>=56 then bvo=not bvo else if bvk>=55 then bvj[bse[bve][bsn]]=bvj[bse[bve][bsm]][bvj[bse[bve][bso]]];else local cgs,cgt=bvd[bsn],bvd[bsm] local cgu=bsi[bvd[bsq]] local cgv=cgt+1 cgv=cgv+1 local cgw=cgu[1] local cgx=cgu[cgv] local cgy=cgu[2] local cgz=cgt*cgy+cgw local cha=cgx-cgz local chb=bsg[cha] local chc=chb[36929][1] local chd=chc[3] local che=chc[2] local chf=brs:TA3C4(brt,1) if chc[1]==1 then chf[1]=bvj[che] else local chg=brv[che] if chd==0 and chg~=nil and chg[2]~=nil then local chh=chg[3] local chi=chg[2] local chj=chg[1] if(chj==0 or chj==1) and chh~=nil then chg=chi[chh] else chg=chj[chi] end end chf[1]=chg end bvj[cgs]=brs:IN(brt,chb,chf,brw) end end else if bvk>=brt[1][11][6] then local chk=bvd[bsn] local chl=bwa[bwc] bwc=bwc-1 chl() else if bvk>=brt[1][40] then bvj[bvd[bsn]]=brt[31];else bvj[bvd[bsn]]=bsh end end end else if bvk>=brt[1][88][4] then if bvk>=65 then local chm=bvd[bsn] local chn=bvj[chm]+bvj[chm+brt[1][3][3]] bvj[chm]=chn if chn<=bvj[chm+1] then bvj[bvd[bso]],bve=chn,bvd[bsm] end else if bvk>=brt[1][3][5] then local cho=bvd[bsn];bvj[cho]=bvj[cho]();else local chp=bvj[bvd[bsn]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=chp end end else if bvk<=brt[1][47][1] then if bvk>=brt[1][47][1] then bvo=bvj[(bvd[bsn]-bvd[bsq])] else if bvj[bvd[bsn]] then bve=bvd[bsm];end;end else local chq=bvd[bsn] bvj[chq](bvj[chq+1],bvj[chq+brt[1][3][3]]) end end end else if bvk>=brt[1][59][5] then if bvk<=76 then if bvk>=75 then if bvk<=75 then bvj[bvd[bsn]]=bvj[bvd[bsm]]..bvj[bvd[bso]];else bvo=bvo*bvj[bvd[bsm]] end else if bvk>=brt[1][98][7] then local chr,chs=bvd[bsn],bvd[bsm] local cht=bsi[bvd[bsq]] local chu=chs+brt[1][3][3] local chv=cht[2] local chw=cht[chu] local chx=cht[1] local chy=chs*chv+chx local chz=chw-chy local cia=bsg[chz] bvj[chr]=brs:IN(brt,cia,nil,brw) else local cib,cic=bvd[bsn],bvd[bsm] local cid=bsg[cic] local cie=cid[36929] local cif=#cie local cig=brs:TA3C4(brt,cif) for cih=1,cif do local cii=cie[cih] local cij=cii[3] local cik=cii[2] if cii[1]==1 then cig[cih]=bvj[cik] else local cil=brv[cik] while brt[1][74] do if cij==0 and cil~=nil and cil[2]~=nil then local cim=cil[1] local cin=cil[3] local cio=cil[2] if(cim==0 or cim==1) and cin~=nil then cil=cio[cin] else cil=cim[cio] end end break end cig[cih]=cil end end bvj[cib]=brs:IN(brt,cid,cig,brw) end end else if bvk<=brt[1][108][5] then if bvk>=brt[1][108][5] then local cip=bvd[bsn] local ciq=bwa[bwc] local cir=bwa[bwc-1] local cis=bwa[bwc-brt[1][3][3]] local cit=bwa[bwc-brt[1][92][10]] bwc=bwc-brt[1][39][3] local ciu=bvu(bvt,cit(cis,cir,ciq)) bvh=cip+ciu-1 while brt[1][43][4] do for civ=1,ciu do bvj[cip+civ-1]=bvt[civ] end break end else bvj[bvd[bsn]]=#bvj[bvd[bsm]];end else bvj[bvd[bsn]]=bvj[bvd[bsm]]^bvj[bvd[bso]];end end else if bvk>=70 then if bvk<=71 then if bvk<=70 then bvj[bvd[bsn]]=bvj[bvd[bsm]]%bvj[bvd[bso]];else local ciw=bvd[bsn] local cix=bvp local ciy=cix+1 local ciz=bwc local cja=bwa[ciy] bvj[ciw]=cja(brs:UNCE3(brt,bwa,ciy+1,ciz)) bwc=cix local cjb=bvz[bvi] bvi=bvi-1 bvp=cjb or 0 end else local cjc,cjd=bvd[bsn],bvd[bsm] local cje=bsg[cjd] local cjf=cje[36929][1] local cjg=cjf[2] local cjh=cjf[3] local cji=brs:TA3C4(brt,1) if cjf[1]==1 then cji[1]=bvj[cjg] else local cjj=brv[cjg] if cjh==0 and cjj~=nil and cjj[2]~=nil then local cjk=cjj[2] local cjl=cjj[1] local cjm=cjj[3] if(cjl==0 or cjl==1) and cjm~=nil then cjj=cjk[cjm] else cjj=cjl[cjk] end end cji[1]=cjj end bvj[cjc]=brs:IN(brt,cje,cji,brw) end else if bvk>=brt[1][25] then if bvk>=69 then local cjn,cjo=bvd[bsn],bvd[bsm] local cjp=bsg[cjo] local cjq=cjp[36929] local cjr=#cjq local cjs=brs:TA3C4(brt,cjr) for cjt=1,cjr do local cju=cjq[cjt] local cjv=cju[3] local cjw=cju[2] if not(((brt[1][103][2]) and(brt[1][103][6]))) then else if cju[1]==1 then if cjv==0 then local cjx=bvj[cjw] local cjy=bvq[cjw] if cjy~=cjx then bvq[cjw]=cjx if not cjy then bwb=bwb+1 bvr[bwb]=cjw end cjy=cjx end cjs[cjt]=cjy else cjs[cjt]=bvj[cjw] end else local cjz=brv[cjw] if cjv==0 and cjz~=nil and cjz[2]~=nil then local cka=cjz[2] local ckb=cjz[1] local ckc=cjz[3] if(ckb==0 or ckb==1) and ckc~=nil then cjz=cka[ckc] else cjz=ckb[cka] end end cjs[cjt]=cjz end end end bvj[cjn]=brs:IN(brt,cjp,cjs,brw) else local ckd=bvd[bsn] local cke,ckf,ckg=bvj[ckd]() if cke then do local ckh,cki,ckj=ckf,ckg,bvd[bsm] bvj[ckd+brt[1][92][10]]=ckh bvj[ckd+brt[1][39][3]]=cki bve=ckj end end end else if bvk>=brt[1][19][2] then local ckk=bvd[bsn];local ckl,ckm,ckn=bvj[ckk],bvj[ckk+1],bvj[ckk+brt[1][3][3]];bvj[ckk]=brt[7](function() for cko,ckp in ckl,ckm,ckn do brt[6](true,cko,ckp);end end);bvh=ckk+brt[1][3][3];bve=bvd[bsm];else local ckq=bvd[bsn];local ckr=bvj[ckq];local cks=bvj[ckq+brt[1][3][3]];bvj[ckq]=ckr-cks;bve=bvd[bsm];end end end end end else if bvk<=brt[1][18] then if bvk<=brt[1][2][5] then if bvk<=brt[1][73][5] then if bvk<=brt[1][108][6] then bvj[bvd[bsn]]=bvj[bvd[bsm]]*bvj[bvd[bso]];else local ckt,cku=bvd[bsn],bvd[bsm] local ckv=bsi[bvd[bsq]] local ckw=cku ckw=ckw+brt[1][3][3] local ckx=ckv[ckw] local cky=ckv[2] local ckz=cku local cla=ckv[1] local clb=cla+ckz*cky local clc=ckx-clb local cld=bsg[clc] local cle=cld[36929] local clf=#cle local clg=brs:TA3C4(brt,clf) while brt[1][26][7] do for clh=1,clf do local cli=cle[clh] local clj=cli[2] local clk=cli[3] if cli[1]==1 then if clk==0 then local cll=bvj[clj] local clm=bvq[clj] if clm~=cll then bvq[clj]=cll if not clm then bwb=bwb+1 bvr[bwb]=clj end clm=cll end clg[clh]=clm else clg[clh]=bvj[clj] end else local cln=brv[clj] if not(((brt[1][35][5]) and(brt[1][35][3]))) then else if clk==0 and cln~=nil and cln[2]~=nil then local clo=cln[2] local clp=cln[3] local clq=cln[1] if(clq==0 or clq==1) and clp~=nil then cln=clo[clp] else cln=clq[clo] end end end clg[clh]=cln end end break end bvj[ckt]=brs:IN(brt,cld,clg,brw) end else return bvj[bvd[bsn]] end else if bvk>=brt[1][18] then bvi=bvi+1 bvz[bvi]=bvp bvp=bwc else if bvk>=44 then bvj[bvd[bsn]]=bvj[bvd[bsm]]==bvj[bvd[bso]];else local clr,cls=bvd[bsn],bvd[bsm] local clt=bvj[cls] bvj[clr]=clt[1] end end end else if bvk>=brt[1][39][5] then if bvk>=brt[1][101][4] then if bvk>=brt[1][107][4] then bvj[bvd[bsn]]=bvj[bvd[bsm]]~=bvj[bvd[bso]];else local clu=bwa[bwc] local clv=bwa[bwc-1] local clw=bwa[bwc-brt[1][3][3]] local clx=bwa[bwc-brt[1][92][10]] bwc=bwc-brt[1][39][3] clx(clw,clv,clu) end else if bvk<=brt[1][39][5] then bvj[bvd[bsn]]=nil;else bvj[bvd[bsn]]=not bvj[bvd[bsm]];end end else if bvk<=brt[1][28][2] then if bvk>=brt[1][28][2] then bvj[bvd[bsn]]=bvj[bvd[bsm]]/bvj[bvd[bso]];else local cly=bvd[bsn] local clz=bvd[bsm] local cma=bwc+1 local cmb=(clz==0) and bvh or(cly+clz-1) for cmc=cly,cmb do bwa[cma]=bvj[cmc] cma=cma+1 end bwc=cma-1 end else if bvk>=brt[1][107][3] then bvj[bvd[bsn]]=-bvj[bvd[bsm]];else local cmd=bvd[bsm] brv[cmd][1]=bvj[bvd[bsn]] end end end end end end end else if bvk>=brt[1][12] then if bvk<=268 then if bvk<=250 then if bvk<=brt[1][39][4] then if bvk>=brt[1][51][2] then if bvk<=239 then if bvk>=239 then brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local cme=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local cmf=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local cmg=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) bvj[cme]=bvj[cmf][bvj[cmg]];else local cmh=bse[bve+1] bvj[bvd[bsn]]=bsh[bvd[bsm]];bvj[cmh[bsn]]=bvj[cmh[bsm]][bvj[cmh[bso]]];bve=bve+1 end else if bvk<=brt[1][35][8] then local cmi=bse[bve+1] bvj[bvd[bsn]]=bsh[bvd[bsm]];bvj[cmi[bsn]]=bvj[cmi[bsm]][bvj[cmi[bso]]];bve=bve+1 else local cmj=bvd[bsn] local cmk=bvd[bsm] local cml=bvd[bso] bvj[cmj[1]]=bsh[cmk[1]];bvj[cmj[2]]=bvj[cmk[2]][bvj[cml[2]]];end end else if bvk>=brt[1][78][4] then if bvk<=brt[1][78][4] then local cmm=bse[bve+1] bvj[bvd[bsn]]=bsh[bvd[bsm]];bvj[cmm[bsn]]=bvj[cmm[bsm]][bvj[cmm[bso]]];bve=bve+1 else local cmn=bse[bve+1] bvj[bvd[bsn]]=bsh[bvd[bsm]];bvj[cmn[bsn]]=bvj[cmn[bsm]][bvj[cmn[bso]]];bve=bve+1 end else if bvk>=235 then brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local cmo=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local cmp=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) bvj[cmo]=bvj[cmp];else if bvk>=234 then brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local cmq=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local cmr=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) bvj[cmq]=-bvj[cmr];else brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local cms=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local cmt=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local cmu=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) bvj[cms]=bvj[cmt]%bvj[cmu];end end end end else if bvk<=brt[1][9][6] then if bvk>=245 then if bvk>=brt[1][9][6] then local cmv=bse[bve+1] local cmw=bse[bve+brt[1][3][3]] local cmx=bse[bve+brt[1][92][10]] local cmy=brs:BIAC3(brt,cmw[bsm],bve+130) local cmz=brs:BIAC3(brt,cmx[bsm],cmy) bvj[bvd[bsn]]=bvo bvj[cmv[bsn]]={};bvj[cmw[bsn]]=bsh[cmw[bsm]];bvj[cmx[bsn]]=bvj[cmz];bve=bve+brt[1][92][10] else local cna=bse[bve+1] bvj[bvd[bsn]]=bsh[bvd[bsm]];bvj[cna[bsn]]=bvj[cna[bsm]]>bvj[cna[bso]];bve=bve+1 end else if bvk>=brt[1][56][3] then local cnb=bvd[bsn] local cnc=bvd[bsm] local cnd=brs:BIAC3(brt,cnc[2],bve+245) local cne=brs:BIAC3(brt,cnc[3],cnd) bvj[cnb[1]]=bsh[cnc[1]];bvj[cnb[2]]=bsh[cnc[2]];bvj[cnb[3]]=bvj[cne];bvj[cnb[4]]=bsh[cnc[4]];else if bvk<=brt[1][72][1] then local bvj[cni[1]]=bsh[cnj[1]];bvj[cni[2]]=bvj[cnj[2]][bvj[cnk[2]]];end end end else if bvk<=248 then if bvk>=248 then local cnl=bvd[bsn] local cnm=bvd[bsm] local cnn=bvd[bso] bvj[cnl[1]]=bsh[cnm[1]];bvj[cnl[2]]=bvj[cnm[2]][bvj[cnn[2]]];else local cno=bse[bve+1] bvo=bvj[bvd[bsn]] bvo=#bvo bve=bve+1 end else if bvk<=brt[1][30][5] then local cnp=bse[bve+1] local cnq=bse[bve+brt[1][3][3]] bvj[bvd[bsn]]=bsh[bvd[bsm]];bvj[cnp[bsn]]=bvj[cnp[bsm]][bvj[cnp[bso]]];bvj[cnq[bsn]]=brw[bsh[cnq[bsm]]];while brt[1][108][3] do bve=bve+brt[1][3][3] break end else local cnr=bvd[bsn] local cns=bvd[bsm] local cnt=bvd[bso] bvj[cnr[1]]=bsh[cns[1]];bvj[cnr[2]]=bvj[cns[2]][bvj[cnt[2]]];end end end end else if bvk>=brt[1][98][6] then if bvk>=brt[1][51][6] then if bvk>=267 then if bvk<=267 then local cnu=bvd local cnv=cnu[bsn][1] local cnw=cnu[bso][1] local cnx,cny,cnz=bvj[cnv],bvj[cnv+1],bvj[cnv+brt[1][3][3]] while cnx>=cny do bvj[cnv]=cnx bvj[cnv+brt[1][92][10]]=cnx bvj[cnu[bsn][2]]=bsh[cnu[bsm][2]] bvj[cnu[bsn][3]]=bvj[cnu[bsm][3]]-bvj[cnu[bso][3]] bvj[cnu[bsn][4]]=bvj[cnu[bsm][4]]*bvj[cnu[bso][4]] bvj[cnu[bsn][5]]=bvj[cnu[bsm][5]]%bvj[cnu[bso][5]] bvj[cnu[bsn][6]]=bsh[cnu[bsm][6]] bvj[cnu[bsn][7]]=bvj[cnu[bsm][7]]+bvj[cnu[bso][7]] bvj[cnu[bsn][8]]=bvj[cnu[bsm][8]][bvj[cnu[bso][8]]] bvj[cnu[bsn][9]]=bvj[cnu[bsm][9]][bvj[cnu[bso][9]]] bvj[cnu[bsn][10]][bvj[cnu[bsm][10]]]=bvj[cnu[bso][10]] bvj[cnu[bsn][11]][bvj[cnu[bsm][11]]]=bvj[cnu[bso][11]] cnx=cnx+cnz end bvj[cnv]=cnx bve=cnu[bsm][1] else local coa=bvd local cob=coa[bsn][1] local coc=coa[bso][1] local cod,coe,cof=bvj[cob],bvj[cob+1],bvj[cob+brt[1][3][3]] while cod<=coe do bvj[cob]=cod bvj[cob+brt[1][92][10]]=cod bvj[coa[bsn][2]]=bvj[coa[bsm][2]] bvj[coa[bsn][3]]=bvj[coa[bsm][3]] bvj[coa[bsn][4]]=bvj[coa[bsm][4]] local cog=coa[bsn][5] local coh=bsh[coa[bsq][5]] local coi=bvj[cog] bvj[cog]=coi[coh](coi,bvj[cog+brt[1][3][3]],bvj[cog+brt[1][92][10]]) bvj[coa[bsn][6]]=bsh[coa[bsm][6]] bvj[coa[bsn][7]]=bvj[coa[bsm][7]]==bvj[coa[bso][7]] if bvj[coa[bsn][8]] then bvj[coa[bsn][10]]=bsh[coa[bsm][10]] bvj[coa[bsn][11]]=bsh[coa[bsm][11]] bvj[coa[bsn][12]]=bvj[coa[bsm][12]]-bvj[coa[bso][12]] bvj[coa[bsn][13]]=bvj[coa[bsm][13]]^bvj[coa[bso][13]] else end if bvj[coa[bsn][14]] then else bvj[coa[bsn][16]]=bsh[coa[bsm][16]] end bvj[coa[bsn][17]]=bvj[coa[bsm][17]]+bvj[coa[bso][17]] cod=cod+cof end bvj[cob]=cod bve=coa[bsm][1] end else if bvk>=brt[1][116][4] then local coj=bvd local cok=coj[bsn][1] local col=coj[bso][1] local com,con,coo=bvj[cok],bvj[cok+1],bvj[cok+brt[1][3][3]] while com<=con do bvj[cok]=com bvj[cok+brt[1][92][10]]=com bvj[coj[bsn][2]]=bvj[coj[bsm][2]][bvj[coj[bso][2]]] bvj[coj[bsn][3]][bvj[coj[bsm][3]]]=bvj[coj[bso][3]] com=com+coo end bvj[cok]=com bve=coj[bsm][1] else if bvd[bsm]~=brt[1][104][2] then local cop=bse[bvj[bvd[bso]]] local coq,cor=cop[bsm],cop[bsn] cop[bsn]=coq cop[bsm]=cor bvd[bsm]=brt[1][104][2] end end end else if bvk<=262 then if bvk>=262 then if bvd[bsn]~=brt[1][5][2] then local cos=bse[bvj[bvd[bsq]]] local cot,cou,cov=cos[bsm],cos[bso],cos[bsn] cos[bsn]=cot cos[bsm]=cou cos[bso]=cov bvd[bsn]=brt[1][5][2] end else if bvk>=261 then if bvd[bsm]~=brt[1][50][2] then local cow=bse[bvj[bvd[bso]]] local cox,coy=cow[bsm],cow[bsn] cow[bsn]=cox cow[bsm]=coy bvd[bsm]=brt[1][50][2] end else if bvd[bsm]~=15 then local coz=bse[bvj[bvd[bsq]]] local cpa,cpb,cpc=coz[bsn],coz[bso],coz[bsm] coz[bsn]=cpa coz[bsm]=cpb coz[bso]=cpc bvd[bsm]=15 end end end else if bvk>=264 then local cpd=bvd local cpe=cpd[bsn][1] local cpf=cpd[bso][1] local cpg,cph,cpi=bvj[cpe],bvj[cpe+1],bvj[cpe+brt[1][3][3]] while cpg<=cph do bvj[cpe]=cpg bvj[cpe+brt[1][92][10]]=cpg bvj[cpd[bsn][2]]=bvj[cpd[bsm][2]] local cpj,cpk=bvj[cpd[bsm][3]],cpd[bsn][3];bvj[cpk+1]=cpj;bvj[cpk]=cpj[bsh[cpd[bso][3]]] bvo=bvj[cpd[bsn][4]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvo bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvj[cpd[bsn][6]] local cpl cpl=bsh[cpd[bsm][7]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=cpl local cpm=cpd[bsn][8] local cpn=bwa[bwc] local cpo=bwa[bwc-1] local cpp=bwa[bwc-brt[1][3][3]] bwc=bwc-brt[1][92][10] bvj[cpm]=cpp(cpo,cpn) bvj[cpd[bsn][9]]=bvj[cpd[bsm][9]] local cpq,cpr=bvj[cpd[bsm][10]],cpd[bsn][10];bvj[cpr+1]=cpq;bvj[cpr]=cpq[bsh[cpd[bso][10]]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvj[cpd[bsn][11]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvj[cpd[bsn][12]] bvo=bvj[cpd[bsn][13]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvo bvj[cpd[bsn][15]]={} bvj[cpd[bsn][16]]=bsh[cpd[bsm][16]] bvj[cpd[bsn][17]][bvj[cpd[bsm][17]]]=bvj[cpd[bso][17]] bvj[cpd[bsn][18]]=bsh[cpd[bsm][18]] bvj[cpd[bsn][19]]={} bvj[cpd[bsn][20]][bvj[cpd[bsm][20]]]=bvj[cpd[bso][20]] bvj[cpd[bsn][21]]=bsh[cpd[bsm][21]] bvj[cpd[bsn][22]]=bvj[cpd[bsm][22]][bvj[cpd[bso][22]]] bvj[cpd[bsn][23]][bvj[cpd[bsm][23]]]=bvj[cpd[bso][23]] bvj[cpd[bsn][24]]=bsh[cpd[bsm][24]] bvj[cpd[bsn][25]][bvj[cpd[bsm][25]]]=bvj[cpd[bso][25]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvj[cpd[bsn][26]] local cps=bwa[bwc] local cpt=bwa[bwc-1] local cpu=bwa[bwc-brt[1][3][3]] local cpv=bwa[bwc-brt[1][92][10]] bwc=bwc-brt[1][39][3] cpv(cpu,cpt,cps) cpg=cpg+cpi end bvj[cpe]=cpg bve=cpd[bsm][1] else if bvd[bsn]~=brt[1][29][10] then local cpw=bse[bvj[bvd[bso]]] local cpx,cpy=cpw[bsm],cpw[bsn] cpw[bsn]=cpx cpw[bsm]=cpy bvd[bsn]=brt[1][29][10] end end end end else if bvk>=brt[1][101][3] then if bvk>=259 then if bvd[bsm]~=brt[1][7][1] then local cpz=bse[bvj[bvd[bsq]]] local cqa,cqb,cqc=cpz[bso],cpz[bsm],cpz[bsn] cpz[bsn]=cqa cpz[bsm]=cqb cpz[bso]=cqc while brt[1][65][7] do bvd[bsm]=brt[1][7][1] break end end else if bvk>=258 then local cqd=bvd local cqe=cqd[bsn][1] local cqf=cqd[bso][1] local cqg,cqh,cqi=bvj[cqe],bvj[cqe+1],bvj[cqe+brt[1][3][3]] while cqg<=cqh do bvj[cqe]=cqg bvj[cqe+brt[1][92][10]]=cqg bvj[cqd[bsn][2]]=brw[bsh[cqd[bsm][2]]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvj[cqd[bsn][3]] bvj[cqd[bsn][4]]=bvj[cqd[bsm][4]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvj[cqd[bsn][5]] local cqj=cqd[bsn][6] local cqk=bwa[bwc] local cql=bwa[bwc-1] bwc=bwc-brt[1][3][3] cql(cqk) bvj[cqd[bsn][7]]=brw[bsh[cqd[bsm][7]]] bvj[cqd[bsn][8]]=bsh[cqd[bsm][8]] bvj[cqd[bsn][9]]=bvj[cqd[bsm][9]][bvj[cqd[bso][9]]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvj[cqd[bsn][10]] local cqm cqm=bsh[cqd[bsm][11]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=cqm local cqn=cqd[bsn][12] local cqo=bwa[bwc] local cqp=bwa[bwc-1] bwc=bwc-brt[1][3][3] cqp(cqo) cqg=cqg+cqi end bvj[cqe]=cqg bve=cqd[bsm][1] else local cqq=bvd local cqr=cqq[bsn][1] local cqs=cqq[bso][1] local cqt,cqu,cqv=bvj[cqr],bvj[cqr+1],bvj[cqr+brt[1][3][3]] while cqt<=cqu do bvj[cqr]=cqt bvj[cqr+brt[1][92][10]]=cqt bvj[cqq[bsn][2]]=bvj[cqq[bsm][2]][bvj[cqq[bso][2]]] bvj[cqq[bsn][3]][bvj[cqq[bsm][3]]]=bvj[cqq[bso][3]] cqt=cqt+cqv end bvj[cqr]=cqt bve=cqq[bsm][1] end end else if bvk<=brt[1][97][5] then if bvk<=brt[1][13][8] then if bvk>=brt[1][13][8] then do for cqw=bwb,1,-1 do local cqx=bvr[cqw] local cqy=bvq[cqx] if cqy then local cqz=cqy[1] if cqz==0 then if cqy[2]==bvj then cqy[1]=1 cqy[2]={cqy[2][cqy[3]]} cqy[3]=1 end else if cqz==bvj then cqy[1]={cqy[1][cqy[2]]} cqy[2]=1 end end end bvq[cqx]=nil bvr[cqw]=nil end bwb=0 local cra=bvd[bsm] local crb=bwc local crc=cra local crd=crb-crc+1 local cre=bwa[crd] return cre(brs:UNCE3(brt,bwa,crd+1,crb)) end else local crf=bvd local crg=crf[bsn][1] local crh=crf[bso][1] local cri,crj,crk=bvj[crg],bvj[crg+1],bvj[crg+brt[1][3][3]] while cri<=crj do bvj[crg]=cri bvj[crg+brt[1][92][10]]=cri bvj[crf[bsn][2]]=bvj[crf[bsm][2]] local crl,crm=bvj[crf[bsm][3]],crf[bsn][3];bvj[crm+1]=crl;bvj[crm]=crl[bsh[crf[bso][3]]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvj[crf[bsn][4]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvj[crf[bsn][5]] local crn crn=bsh[crf[bsm][6]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=crn local cro=crf[bsn][7] local crp=bwa[bwc] local crq=bwa[bwc-1] local crr=bwa[bwc-brt[1][3][3]] bwc=bwc-brt[1][92][10] bvj[cro]=crr(crq,crp) bvj[crf[bsn][8]]=bvj[crf[bsm][8]] local crs,crt=bvj[crf[bsm][9]],crf[bsn][9];bvj[crt+1]=crs;bvj[crt]=crs[bsh[crf[bso][9]]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvj[crf[bsn][10]] bvo=bvj[crf[bsn][11]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvo bvo=bvj[crf[bsn][13]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvo bvj[crf[bsn][15]]={} bvj[crf[bsn][16]]=bsh[crf[bsm][16]] bvj[crf[bsn][17]][bvj[crf[bsm][17]]]=bvj[crf[bso][17]] bvj[crf[bsn][18]]=bsh[crf[bsm][18]] bvj[crf[bsn][19]]={} bvj[crf[bsn][20]][bvj[crf[bsm][20]]]=bvj[crf[bso][20]] bvj[crf[bsn][21]]=bsh[crf[bsm][21]] bvj[crf[bsn][22]]=bvj[crf[bsm][22]][bvj[crf[bso][22]]] bvj[crf[bsn][23]][bvj[crf[bsm][23]]]=bvj[crf[bso][23]] bvj[crf[bsn][24]]=bsh[crf[bsm][24]] bvj[crf[bsn][25]][bvj[crf[bsm][25]]]=bvj[crf[bso][25]] bvo=bvj[crf[bsn][26]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvo local cru=bwa[bwc] local crv=bwa[bwc-1] local crw=bwa[bwc-brt[1][3][3]] local crx=bwa[bwc-brt[1][92][10]] bwc=bwc-brt[1][39][3] crx(crw,crv,cru) cri=cri+crk end bvj[crg]=cri bve=crf[bsm][1] end else bvj[bvd[bsn]]=bvj[bvd[bso]]*bvj[bvd[bsm]];end else if bvk<=brt[1][50][1] then local cry=bvd local crz=cry[bsn][1] local csa=cry[bso][1] local csb,csc,csd=bvj[crz],bvj[crz+1],bvj[crz+brt[1][3][3]] while csb<=csc do bvj[crz]=csb bvj[crz+brt[1][92][10]]=csb bvj[cry[bsn][2]]=bvj[cry[bsm][2]][bvj[cry[bso][2]]] bvj[cry[bsn][3]]=bvj[cry[bsm][3]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvj[cry[bsn][4]] bvo=bvj[cry[bsn][5]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvo bvj[cry[bsn][11]]=bvj[cry[bsm][11]]%bvj[cry[bso][11]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvj[cry[bsn][12]] local cse=cry[bsn][13] local csf=bwa[bwc] local csg=bwa[bwc-1] local csh=bwa[bwc-brt[1][3][3]] bwc=bwc-brt[1][92][10] bvj[cse]=csh(csg,csf) bvj[cry[bsn][14]]=bvj[cry[bsm][14]] bvj[cry[bsn][15]]=bvj[cry[bsm][15]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvj[cry[bsn][16]] bvo=bvj[cry[bsn][17]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvo bvo=bvj[cry[bsn][19]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvo local csi=cry[bsn][21] local csj=bwa[bwc] local csk=bwa[bwc-1] local csl=bwa[bwc-brt[1][3][3]] bwc=bwc-brt[1][92][10] bvj[csi]=csl(csk,csj) bvj[cry[bsn][22]]=bvj[cry[bsm][22]]-bvj[cry[bso][22]] bvj[cry[bsn][23]]=bsh[cry[bsm][23]] bvj[cry[bsn][24]]=bvj[cry[bsm][24]]%bvj[cry[bso][24]] bvj[cry[bsn][25]]=bvj[cry[bsm][25]] bvo=bvj[cry[bsn][26]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvo bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvj[cry[bsn][28]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvj[cry[bsn][29]] local csm=cry[bsn][30] local csn=bwa[bwc] local cso=bwa[bwc-1] local csp=bwa[bwc-brt[1][3][3]] bwc=bwc-brt[1][92][10] bvj[csm]=csp(cso,csn) bvj[cry[bsn][31]]=bvj[cry[bsm][31]] bvj[cry[bsn][32]]=bvj[cry[bsm][32]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvj[cry[bsn][33]] bvo=bvj[cry[bsn][34]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvo local csq=cry[bsn][36] local csr=bwa[bwc] local css=bwa[bwc-1] bwc=bwc-brt[1][3][3] bvj[csq]=css(csr) bvj[cry[bsn][37]]=bvj[cry[bsm][37]]..bvj[cry[bso][37]] csb=csb+csd end bvj[crz]=csb bve=cry[bsm][1] else local cst=bvd local csu=cst[bsn][1] local csv=cst[bso][1] local csw,csx,csy=bvj[csu],bvj[csu+1],bvj[csu+brt[1][3][3]] while csw>=csx do bvj[csu]=csw bvj[csu+brt[1][92][10]]=csw bvj[cst[bsn][2]]=bsh[cst[bsm][2]] bvj[cst[bsn][3]]=bvj[cst[bsm][3]]-bvj[cst[bso][3]] bvj[cst[bsn][4]]=bvj[cst[bsm][4]]*bvj[cst[bso][4]] bvj[cst[bsn][5]]=bvj[cst[bsm][5]]%bvj[cst[bso][5]] bvj[cst[bsn][6]]=bsh[cst[bsm][6]] bvj[cst[bsn][7]]=bvj[cst[bsm][7]]+bvj[cst[bso][7]] bvj[cst[bsn][8]]=bvj[cst[bsm][8]][bvj[cst[bso][8]]] bvj[cst[bsn][9]]=bvj[cst[bsm][9]][bvj[cst[bso][9]]] bvj[cst[bsn][10]][bvj[cst[bsm][10]]]=bvj[cst[bso][10]] bvk>=brt[1][95][4] then if bvk>=brt[1][60][4] then local csz=bvd local cta=csz[bsn][1] local ctb=csz[bso][1] local ctc,ctd,cte=bvj[cta],bvj[cta+1],bvj[cta+brt[1][3][3]] while ctc<=ctd do bvj[cta]=ctc if not(((brt[1][105][4]) and(brt[1][105][5]))) then else bvj[cta+brt[1][92][10]]=ctc end bvj[csz[bsn][2]]=bvj[csz[bsm][2]][bvj[csz[bso][2]]] bvj[csz[bsn][3]]=bvj[csz[bsm][3]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvj[csz[bsn][4]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvj[csz[bsn][5]] bvj[csz[bsn][6]]=bsh[csz[bsm][6]] bvj[csz[bsn][7]]=bvj[csz[bsm][7]]-bvj[csz[bso][7]] bvj[csz[bsn][8]]=bvj[csz[bsm][8]]*bvj[csz[bso][8]] cti=bwa[bwc-brt[1][3][3]] if not(((brt[1][29][9]) and(brt[1][29][3]))) then else bwc=bwc-brt[1][92][10] end bvj[ctf]=cti(cth,ctg) bvj[csz[bsn][13]]=bvj[csz[bsm][13]] bvj[csz[bsn][14]]=bvj[csz[bsm][14]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvj[csz[bsn][15]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvj[csz[bsn][16]] bvo=bvj[csz[bsn][17]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvo local ctj=csz[bsn][19] local ctk=bwa[bwc] local ctl=bwa[bwc-1] local ctm=bwa[bwc-brt[1][3][3]] bwc=bwc-brt[1][92][10] bvj[ctj]=ctm(ctl,ctk) bvj[csz[bsn][20]]=bvj[csz[bsm][20]]-bvj[csz[bso][20]] bvj[csz[bsn][21]]=bsh[csz[bsm][21]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvo local ctn=csz[bsn][29] local cto=bwa[bwc] local ctp=bwa[bwc-1] local ctq=bwa[bwc-brt[1][3][3]] bwc=bwc-brt[1][92][10] bvj[ctn]=ctq(ctp,cto) bvj[csz[bsn][30]]=bvj[csz[bsm][30]] bvj[csz[bsn][31]]=bvj[csz[bsm][31]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvj[csz[bsn][32]] bvo=bvj[csz[bsn][33]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvo local ctr=csz[bsn][35] local cts=bwa[bwc] local ctt=bwa[bwc-1] bwc=bwc-brt[1][3][3] bvj[ctr]=ctt(cts) bvj[csz[bsn][36]]=bvj[csz[bsm][36]]..bvj[csz[bso][36]] ctc=ctc+cte end bvj[cta]=ctc bve=csz[bsm][1] else local ctu=bvd local ctv=ctu[bsn][1] local ctw=ctu[bso][1] local ctx,cty,ctz=bvj[ctv],bvj[ctv+1],bvj[ctv+brt[1][3][3]] while ctx<=cty do bvj[ctv]=ctx bvj[ctv+brt[1][92][10]]=ctx bvj[ctu[bsn][2]]=bvj[ctu[bsm][2]][bvj[ctu[bso][2]]] bvj[ctu[bsn][3]][bvj[ctu[bsm][3]]]=bvj[ctu[bso][3]] ctx=ctx+ctz end bvj[ctv]=ctx bve=ctu[bsm][1] end else if bvk<=292 then local cua=bvd local cub=cua[bsn][1] local cuc=cua[bso][1] local cud,cue,cuf=bvj[cub],bvj[cub+1],bvj[cub+brt[1][3][3]] while cud<=cue do bvj[cub]=cud bvj[cub+brt[1][92][10]]=cud bvj[cua[bsn][2]]=bvj[cua[bsm][2]][bvj[cua[bso][2]]] bvj[cua[bsn][3]]=bvj[cua[bsm][3]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvj[cua[bsn][4]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvj[cua[bsn][5]] bvj[cua[bsn][6]]=bsh[cua[bsm][6]] bvj[cua[bsn][7]]=bvj[cua[bsm][7]]-bvj[cua[bso][7]] local cuh=bwa[bwc] local cui=bwa[bwc-1] local cuj=bwa[bwc-brt[1][3][3]] bwc=bwc-brt[1][92][10] bvj[cug]=cuj(cui,cuh) bvj[cua[bsn][13]]=bvj[cua[bsm][13]] bvj[cua[bsn][14]]=bvj[cua[bsm][14]] bwc=bwc+1 cun=bwa[bwc-brt[1][3][3]] bwc=bwc-brt[1][92][10] bvj[cuk]=cun(cum,cul) bvj[cua[bsn][20]]=bvj[cua[bsm][20]]-bvj[cua[bso][20]] bvj[cua[bsn][21]]=bsh[cua[bsm][21]] bvj[cua[bsn][22]]=bvj[cua[bsm][22]]%bvj[cua[bso][22]] bvj[cua[bsn][23]]=bvj[cua[bsm][23]] bvo=bvj[cua[bsn][24]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvo bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvj[cua[bsn][26]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvj[cua[bsn][27]] local cuo=cua[bsn][28] local cup=bwa[bwc] local cuq=bwa[bwc-1] local cur=bwa[bwc-brt[1][3][3]] if not(((brt[1][73][7]) and(brt[1][73][6]))) then else bwc=bwc-brt[1][92][10] end bvj[cuo]=cur(cuq,cup) bvj[cua[bsn][29]]=bvj[cua[bsm][29]] bvj[cua[bsn][30]]=bvj[cua[bsm][30]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvj[cua[bsn][31]] bvo=bvj[cua[bsn][32]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvo local cus=cua[bsn][34] local cut=bwa[bwc] local cuu=bwa[bwc-1] bwc=bwc-brt[1][3][3] bvj[cus]=cuu(cut) bvj[cua[bsn][35]]=bvj[cua[bsm][35]]..bvj[cua[bso][35]] cud=cud+cuf end bvj[cub]=cud bve=cua[bsm][1] else local cuv=bvd local cuw=cuv[bsn][1] local cux=cuv[bso][1] local cuy,cuz,cva=bvj[cuw],bvj[cuw+1],bvj[cuw+brt[1][3][3]] while cuy>=cuz do bvj[cuw]=cuy bvj[cuw+brt[1][92][10]]=cuy bvj[cuv[bsn][2]]=bsh[cuv[bsm][2]] bvj[cuv[bsn][3]]=bvj[cuv[bsm][3]]-bvj[cuv[bso][3]] bvj[cuv[bsn][4]]=bvj[cuv[bsm][4]]*bvj[cuv[bso][4]] bvj[cuv[bsn][5]]=bvj[cuv[bsm][5]]%bvj[cuv[bso][5]] bvj[cuv[bsn][10]][bvj[cuv[bsm][10]]]=bvj[cuv[bso][10]] bvj[cuv[bsn][11]][bvj[cuv[bsm][11]]]=bvj[cuv[bso][11]] cuy=cuy+cva end bvj[cuw]=cuy bve=cuv[bsm][1] end end else if bvk<=289 then if bvk<=brt[1][85] then if bvk>=brt[1][85] then local cvb=bwa[bwc] local cvc=bwa[bwc-1] bwc=bwc-brt[1][3][3] bvj[bvd[bsn]]=cvc(cvb) else bvj[bvd[bsm]]=bvj[bvd[bsn]][bvj[bvd[bso]]];end else bvj[bvd[bsn]]=bvj[bvd[bso]]==bvj[bvd[bsm]];end else if bvk>=brt[1][23][2] then local cvd=bvd local cve=cvd[bsn][1] local cvf=cvd[bso][1] local cvg,cvh,cvi=bvj[cve],bvj[cve+1],bvj[cve+brt[1][3][3]] while cvg<=cvh do bvj[cve]=cvg bvj[cve+brt[1][92][10]]=cvg bvj[cvd[bsn][2]]=bvj[cvd[bsm][2]][bvj[cvd[bso][2]]] bvj[cvd[bsn][3]][bvj[cvd[bsm][3]]]=bvj[cvd[bso][3]] cvg=cvg+cvi end bvj[cve]=cvg bve=cvd[bsm][1] else local cvj=bvd local cvk=cvj[bsn][1] local cvl=cvj[bso][1] local cvm,cvn,cvo=bvj[cvk],bvj[cvk+1],bvj[cvk+brt[1][3][3]] while cvm>=cvn do bvj[cvk]=cvm bvj[cvk+brt[1][92][10]]=cvm bvj[cvj[bsn][2]]=bsh[cvj[bsm][2]] bvj[cvj[bsn][3]]=bvj[cvj[bsm][3]]-bvj[cvj[bso][3]] bvj[cvj[bsn][4]]=bvj[cvj[bsm][4]]*bvj[cvj[bso][4]] bvj[cvj[bsn][5]]=bvj[cvj[bsm][5]]%bvj[cvj[bso][5]] bvj[cvj[bsn][6]]=bsh[cvj[bsm][6]] bvj[cvj[bsn][7]]=bvj[cvj[bsm][7]]+bvj[cvj[bso][7]] bvj[cvj[bsn][8]]=bvj[cvj[bsm][8]][bvj[cvj[bso][8]]] bvj[cvj[bsn][9]]=bvj[cvj[bsm][9]][bvj[cvj[bso][9]]] bvj[cvj[bsn][10]][bvj[cvj[bsm][10]]]=bvj[cvj[bso][10]] bvj[cvj[bsn][11]][bvj[cvj[bsm][11]]]=bvj[cvj[bso][11]] cvm=cvm+cvo end bvj[cvk]=cvm bve=cvj[bsm][1] end end end else if bvk<=299 then if bvk<=brt[1][38] then if bvk<=296 then local cvp=bvd local cvq=cvp[bsn][1] local cvr=cvp[bso][1] local cvs,cvt,cvu=bvj[cvq],bvj[cvq+1],bvj[cvq+brt[1][3][3]] while cvs>=cvt do bvj[cvq]=cvs bvj[cvq+brt[1][92][10]]=cvs bvj[cvp[bsn][2]]=bsh[cvp[bsm][2]] bvj[cvp[bsn][3]]=bvj[cvp[bsm][3]]-bvj[cvp[bso][3]] bvj[cvp[bsn][4]]=bvj[cvp[bsm][4]]*bvj[cvp[bso][4]] bvj[cvp[bsn][5]]=bvj[cvp[bsm][5]]%bvj[cvp[bso][5]] bvj[cvp[bsn][6]]=bsh[cvp[bsm][6]] bvj[cvp[bsn][7]]=bvj[cvp[bsm][7]]+bvj[cvp[bso][7]] bvj[cvp[bsn][8]]=bvj[cvp[bsm][8]][bvj[cvp[bso][8]]] bvj[cvp[bsn][9]]=bvj[cvp[bsm][9]][bvj[cvp[bso][9]]] bvj[cvp[bsn][10]][bvj[cvp[bsm][10]]]=bvj[cvp[bso][10]] bvj[cvp[bsn][11]][bvj[cvp[bsm][11]]]=bvj[cvp[bso][11]] cvs=cvs+cvu end bvj[cvq]=cvs bve=cvp[bsm][1] else local cvv=bvd local cvw=cvv[bsn][1] local cvx=cvv[bso][1] local cvy,cvz,cwa=bvj[cvw],bvj[cvw+1],bvj[cvw+brt[1][3][3]] while cvy<=cvz do bvj[cvw]=cvy bvj[cvw+brt[1][92][10]]=cvy bvj[cvv[bsn][2]]=bvj[cvv[bsm][2]][bvj[cvv[bso][2]]] bvj[cvv[bsn][3]][bvj[cvv[bsm][3]]]=bvj[cvv[bso][3]] cvy=cvy+cwa end bvj[cvw]=cvy bve=cvv[bsm][1] end else if bvk<=brt[1][6] then local cwb=bvd local cwc=cwb[bsn][1] local cwd=cwb[bso][1] local cwe,cwf,cwg=bvj[cwc],bvj[cwc+1],bvj[cwc+brt[1][3][3]] while cwe>=cwf do bvj[cwc]=cwe bvj[cwc+brt[1][92][10]]=cwe bvj[cwb[bsn][2]]=bsh[cwb[bsm][2]] bvj[cwb[bsn][3]]=bvj[cwb[bsm][3]]-bvj[cwb[bso][3]] bvj[cwb[bsn][4]]=bvj[cwb[bsm][4]]*bvj[cwb[bso][4]] bvj[cwb[bsn][5]]=bvj[cwb[bsm][5]]%bvj[cwb[bso][5]] bvj[cwb[bsn][6]]=bsh[cwb[bsm][6]] bvj[cwb[bsn][7]]=bvj[cwb[bsm][7]]+bvj[cwb[bso][7]] bvj[cwb[bsn][8]]=bvj[cwb[bsm][8]][bvj[cwb[bso][8]]] bvj[cwb[bsn][9]]=bvj[cwb[bsm][9]][bvj[cwb[bso][9]]] bvj[cwb[bsn][10]][bvj[cwb[bsm][10]]]=bvj[cwb[bso][10]] bvj[cwb[bsn][11]][bvj[cwb[bsm][11]]]=bvj[cwb[bso][11]] cwe=cwe+cwg end bvj[cwc]=cwe bve=cwb[bsm][1] else local cwh=bvd local cwi=cwh[bsn][1] local cwj=cwh[bso][1] local cwk,cwl,cwm=bvj[cwi],bvj[cwi+1],bvj[cwi+brt[1][3][3]] while brt[1][14] do while cwk<=cwl do bvj[cwi]=cwk bvj[cwi+brt[1][92][10]]=cwk bvj[cwh[bsn][2]]=bvj[cwh[bsm][2]][bvj[cwh[bso][2]]] bvj[cwh[bsn][3]][bvj[cwh[bsm][3]]]=bvj[cwh[bso][3]] cwk=cwk+cwm end break end bvj[cwi]=cwk bve=cwh[bsm][1] end end else if bvk>=brt[1][37] then if bvk>=303 then if bvk<=303 then local cwn=bwa[bwc] bwc=bwc-1 cwn() else if bvk<=brt[1][28][7] then bvj[bvd[bsn]]=bsh[bvd[bsm]];else if bvk<=brt[1][90] then local cwo=bvd[bsm] bvj[bvd[bsn]]=brv[cwo] else if bvk>=brt[1][26][6] then if bvk<=brt[1][52] then bvj[bvd[bsn]]=bsh[bvd[bsm]];else if bvk<=brt[1][55][4] then else if bvk<=311 then brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local cwp=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local cwq=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local cwr=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) bvj[cwp]=bvj[cwq]%bvj[cwr];else if bvk>=brt[1][78][1] then if bvk<=brt[1][78][1] then brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local cws=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local cwt=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) bvj[cws]=bvj[cwt];else if bvk>=315 then if bvk<=315 then brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local cwu=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local cwv=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) bvj[cwu]=bvj[cwv];else if bvk<=brt[1][15][5] then brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local cww=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local cwx=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local cwy=cwx bvj[cww]=brv[cwy] else if bvk>=brt[1][111][5] then if bvk>=brt[1][2][6] then if bvk<=brt[1][2][6] then brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local cwz=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local cxa=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) bvj[cwz]=-bvj[cxa];else if bvk<=brt[1][46] then brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local cxb=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local cxc=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local cxd=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) bvj[cxb]=bvj[cxc][bvj[cxd]];else if bvk<=brt[1][103][3] then brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local cxe=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local cxf=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local cxg=cxf bvj[cxe]=brv[cxg] else if bvk<=325 then brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local cxh=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local cxi=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local cxj=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) bvj[cxh]=bvj[cxi][bvj[cxj]];else if bvk>=327 then if bvk>=brt[1][54] then if bvk>=330 then if bvk>=brt[1][26][8] then if bvk<=brt[1][26][8] then brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local cxk=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local cxl=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local cxm=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) bvj[cxk]=bvj[cxl][bvj[cxm]];else if bvk>=brt[1][111][4] then if bvk<=brt[1][111][4] then brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local cxn=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local cxo=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local cxp=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) bvj[cxn][bvj[cxo]]=bvj[cxp];else if bvk>=brt[1][33] then if bvk>=brt[1][98][3] then if bvk<=brt[1][98][3] then brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local cxq=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local cxr=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local cxs=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) bvj[cxq]=bvj[cxr][bvj[cxs]];else if bvk<=338 then brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local cxt=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local cxu=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local cxv=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) bvj[cxt][bvj[cxu]]=bvj[cxv];else if bvk>=brt[1][109][4] then if bvk<=brt[1][83][3] then brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local cxw=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local cxx=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local cxy=cxx brv[cxy][1]=bvj[cxw] else if bvk>=brt[1][3][6] then if bvk<=brt[1][3][6] then brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local cxz=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local cya=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local cyb=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) bvj[cxz]=bvj[cya][bvj[cyb]];else if bvk>=brt[1][59][7] then if bvk>=brt[1][101][6] then if bvk<=brt[1][101][6] then brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local cyc=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local cyd=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local cye=cyd bvj[cyc]=brv[cye] else bvj[bvd[bsn]]=bvj[bvd[bsm]];end else brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local cyf=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local cyg=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local cyh=cyg brv[cyh][1]=bvj[cyf] end else brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local cyi=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local cyj=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local cyk=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) bvj[cyi]=bvj[cyj]-bvj[cyk];end end else brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local cyl=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local cym=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local cyn=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) bvj[cyl][bvj[cym]]=bvj[cyn];end end else brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local cyo=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local cyp=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local cyq=cyp local cyr=brv[cyq] bvj[cyo]=cyr[1] end end end else brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local cys=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local cyt=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local cyu=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) bvj[cys][bvj[cyt]]=bvj[cyu];end else brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local cyv=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local cyw=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local cyx=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) bvj[cyv]=bvj[cyw][bvj[cyx]];end end else brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local cyy=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local cyz=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) bvj[cyy]=-bvj[cyz];end end else brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local cza=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local czb=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local czc=czb local czd=brv[czc] bvj[cza]=czd[1] end else brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local cze=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local czf=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) bvj[cze]=bvj[czf];end else brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local czg=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local czh=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local czi=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) bvj[czg]=bvj[czh][bvj[czi]];end else brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local czj=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local czk=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local czl=czk bvj[czj]=brv[czl] end end end end end else brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local czm=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local czn=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local czo=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) bvj[czm]=bvj[czn][bvj[czo]];end else brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local czp=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local czq=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local czr=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) bvj[czp][bvj[czq]]=bvj[czr];end end end else brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local czs=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local czt=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local czu=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) bvj[czs]=bvj[czt][bvj[czu]];end end else bvj[bvd[bsn]]=bsh[bvd[bsm]];end end end end else brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local czv=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local czw=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) bvj[czv]=bvj[czw];end end end end else bvj[bvd[bsn]]=not(bvj[bvd[bsm]]~=bvj[bvd[bso]]);end else if bvk>=brt[1][29][7] then local czx=bvd local czy=czx[bsn][1] local czz=czx[bso][1] local daa,dab,dac=bvj[czy],bvj[czy+1],bvj[czy+brt[1][3][3]] while daa<=dab do bvj[czy]=daa bvj[czy+brt[1][92][10]]=daa bvj[czx[bsn][2]]=bvj[czx[bsm][2]][bvj[czx[bso][2]]] bvj[czx[bsn][3]][bvj[czx[bsm][3]]]=bvj[czx[bso][3]] daa=daa+dac end bvj[czy]=daa bve=czx[bsm][1] else local dad=bvd local dae=dad[bsn][1] local daf=dad[bso][1] local dag,dah,dai=bvj[dae],bvj[dae+1],bvj[dae+brt[1][3][3]] while dag>=dah do bvj[dae]=dag bvj[dae+brt[1][92][10]]=dag bvj[dad[bsn][2]]=bsh[dad[bsm][2]] bvj[dad[bsn][3]]=bvj[dad[bsm][3]]-bvj[dad[bso][3]] bvj[dad[bsn][4]]=bvj[dad[bsm][4]]*bvj[dad[bso][4]] bvj[dad[bsn][5]]=bvj[dad[bsm][5]]%bvj[dad[bso][5]] bvj[dad[bsn][6]]=bsh[dad[bsm][6]] bvj[dad[bsn][7]]=bvj[dad[bsm][7]]+bvj[dad[bso][7]] bvj[dad[bsn][8]]=bvj[dad[bsm][8]][bvj[dad[bso][8]]] bvj[dad[bsn][9]]=bvj[dad[bsm][9]][bvj[dad[bso][9]]] bvj[dad[bsn][10]][bvj[dad[bsm][10]]]=bvj[dad[bso][10]] bvj[dad[bsn][11]][bvj[dad[bsm][11]]]=bvj[dad[bso][11]] dag=dag+dai end bvj[dae]=dag bve=dad[bsm][1] end end end end else if bvk<=277 then if bvk<=273 then if bvk>=brt[1][66][6] then if bvk>=273 then bvj[bvd[bsn]]=bsh[bvd[bsm]];else local daj=bvd local dak=daj[bsn][1] local dal=daj[bso][1] local dam,dan,dao=bvj[dak],bvj[dak+1],bvj[dak+brt[1][3][3]] while dam>=dan do bvj[dak]=dam bvj[dak+brt[1][92][10]]=dam bvj[daj[bsn][2]]=bsh[daj[bsm][2]] bvj[daj[bsn][3]]=bvj[daj[bsm][3]]^bvj[daj[bso][3]] bvj[daj[bsn][4]]=bvj[daj[bsm][4]]%bvj[daj[bso][4]] bvj[daj[bsn][5]]=bsh[daj[bsm][5]] bvj[daj[bsn][6]]=bvj[daj[bsm][6]]-bvj[daj[bso][6]] bvj[daj[bsn][7]]=bvj[daj[bsm][7]]^bvj[daj[bso][7]] bvj[daj[bsn][8]]=bvj[daj[bsm][8]]%bvj[daj[bso][8]] bvj[daj[bsn][9]]=bvj[daj[bsm][9]]-bvj[daj[bso][9]] bvj[daj[bsn][10]]=bsh[daj[bsm][10]] bvj[daj[bsn][11]]=bvj[daj[bsm][11]]>bvj[daj[bso][11]] if bvj[daj[bsn][12]] then bvj[daj[bsn][14]]=bsh[daj[bsm][14]] else end if bvj[daj[bsn][15]] then else bvj[daj[bsn][17]]=bsh[daj[bsm][17]] end bvj[daj[bsn][18]]=bvj[daj[bsm][18]]..bvj[daj[bso][18]] dam=dam+dao end bvj[dak]=dam bve=daj[bsm][1] end else if bvk<=brt[1][104][6] then if bvk<=269 then local dap=bvd local daq=dap[bsn][1] local dar=dap[bso][1] local das,dat,dau=bvj[daq],bvj[daq+1],bvj[daq+brt[1][3][3]] local dav,daw local dax,day while das>=dat do bvj[daq]=das bvj[daq+brt[1][92][10]]=das bvj[dap[bsn][2]]=bsh[dap[bsm][2]] bvj[dap[bsn][3]]=bvj[dap[bsm][3]]^bvj[dap[bso][3]] bvj[dap[bsn][4]]=bvj[dap[bsm][4]]%bvj[dap[bso][4]] bvj[dap[bsn][5]]=bsh[dap[bsm][5]] bvj[dap[bsn][6]]=bvj[dap[bsm][6]]-bvj[dap[bso][6]] bvj[dap[bsn][7]]=bvj[dap[bsm][7]]^bvj[dap[bso][7]] bvj[dap[bsn][8]]=bvj[dap[bsm][8]]%bvj[dap[bso][8]] bvj[dap[bsn][9]]=bvj[dap[bsm][9]]-bvj[dap[bso][9]] bvj[dap[bsn][10]]=bsh[dap[bsm][10]] bvj[dap[bsn][11]]=bvj[dap[bsm][11]]>bvj[dap[bso][11]] if bvj[dap[bsn][12]] then if not daw then dav=bsh[dap[bsm][14]] daw=true end bvj[dap[bsn][14]]=dav else end if bvj[dap[bsn][15]] then else if not day then dax=bsh[dap[bsm][17]] day=true end bvj[dap[bsn][17]]=dax end bvj[dap[bsn][18]]=bvj[dap[bsm][18]]..bvj[dap[bso][18]] das=das+dau end bvj[daq]=das bve=dap[bsm][1] else do for daz=bwb,1,-1 do local dba=bvr[daz] local dbb=bvq[dba] while brt[1][95][8] do if dbb then local dbc=dbb[1] if dbc==0 then if dbb[2]==bvj then dbb[1]=1 dbb[2]={dbb[2][dbb[3]]} dbb[3]=1 end else if dbc==bvj then dbb[1]={dbb[1][dbb[2]]} dbb[2]=1 end end end break end bvq[dba]=nil bvr[daz]=nil end bwb=0 local dbd=bvp local dbe=dbd+1 local dbf=bwc local dbg=bwa[dbe] return dbg(brs:UNCE3(brt,bwa,dbe+1,dbf)) end end else local dbh=bvd local dbi=dbh[bsn][1] local dbj=dbh[bso][1] local dbk,dbl,dbm=bvj[dbi],bvj[dbi+1],bvj[dbi+brt[1][3][3]] while dbk<=dbl do bvj[dbi]=dbk bvj[dbi+brt[1][92][10]]=dbk bvj[dbh[bsn][2]]=bvj[dbh[bsm][2]] bvj[dbh[bsn][3]]=bvj[dbh[bsm][3]] bvj[dbh[bsn][4]]=bvj[dbh[bsm][4]] local dbn=dbh[bsn][5] local dbo=bsh[dbh[bsq][5]] local dbp=bvj[dbn] bvj[dbn]=dbp[dbo](dbp,bvj[dbn+brt[1][3][3]],bvj[dbn+brt[1][92][10]]) bvj[dbh[bsn][6]]=bsh[dbh[bsm][6]] bvj[dbh[bsn][7]]=bvj[dbh[bsm][7]]==bvj[dbh[bso][7]] if bvj[dbh[bsn][8]] then bvj[dbh[bsn][10]]=bsh[dbh[bsm][10]] bvj[dbh[bsn][11]]=bsh[dbh[bsm][11]] bvj[dbh[bsn][12]]=bvj[dbh[bsm][12]]-bvj[dbh[bso][12]] bvj[dbh[bsn][13]]=bvj[dbh[bsm][13]]^bvj[dbh[bso][13]] else end if bvj[dbh[bsn][14]] then else bvj[dbh[bsn][16]]=bsh[dbh[bsm][16]] end bvj[dbh[bsn][17]]=bvj[dbh[bsm][17]]+bvj[dbh[bso][17]] dbk=dbk+dbm end bvj[dbi]=dbk bve=dbh[bsm][1] end end else if bvk<=brt[1][13][6] then if bvk>=brt[1][13][6] then local dbq=bvd local dbr=dbq[bsn][1] local dbs=dbq[bso][1] local dbt,dbu,dbv=bvj[dbr],bvj[dbr+1],bvj[dbr+brt[1][3][3]] while brt[1][2][8] do while dbt<=dbu do bvj[dbr]=dbt bvj[dbr+brt[1][92][10]]=dbt bvj[dbq[bsn][2]]=bvj[dbq[bsm][2]][bvj[dbq[bso][2]]] bvj[dbq[bsn][3]][bvj[dbq[bsm][3]]]=bvj[dbq[bso][3]] dbt=dbt+dbv end break end bvj[dbr]=dbt bve=dbq[bsm][1] else local dbw=bvd local dbx=dbw[bsn][1] local dby,dbz,dca=bvj[dbx],bvj[dbx+1],bvj[dbx+brt[1][3][3]] bvj[dbx]=brt[7](function() for dcb,dcc in dby,dbz,dca do brt[6](true,dcb,dcc) end end) bvh=dbx+brt[1][3][3] if not(((brt[1][5][3]) and(brt[1][66][8]))) then else while true do local dcd,dce,dcf=bvj[dbx]() if not dcd then break end do local dcg,dch=dce,dcf bvj[dbx+brt[1][92][10]]=dcg bvj[dbx+brt[1][39][3]]=dch end bvj[dbw[bsn][2]]=bvj[dbw[bsm][2]] local dci,dcj=bvj[dbw[bsm][3]],dbw[bsn][3];bvj[dcj+1]=dci;bvj[dcj]=dci[bsh[dbw[bso][3]]] bvo=bvj[dbw[bsn][4]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvo bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvj[dbw[bsn][6]] local dck=dbw[bsn][7] local dcl=bwa[bwc] local dcm=bwa[bwc-1] bwc=bwc-brt[1][3][3] dcm(dcl) end end bve=dbw[bsm][1] end else if bvk>=277 then local dcn=bvd local dco=dcn[bsn][1] local dcp=dcn[bso][1] local dcq,dcr,dcs=bvj[dco],bvj[dco+1],bvj[dco+brt[1][3][3]] while dcq<=dcr do bvj[dco]=dcq bvj[dco+brt[1][92][10]]=dcq bvj[dcn[bsn][2]]=bvj[dcn[bsm][2]] local dct,dcu=bvj[dcn[bsm][3]],dcn[bsn][3];bvj[dcu+1]=dct;bvj[dcu]=dct[bsh[dcn[bso][3]]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvj[dcn[bsn][4]] bvo=bvj[dcn[bsn][5]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvo local dcv dcv=bsh[dcn[bsm][7]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=dcv local dcw=dcn[bsn][8] local dcx=bwa[bwc] local dcy=bwa[bwc-1] local dcz=bwa[bwc-brt[1][3][3]] bwc=bwc-brt[1][92][10] bvj[dcw]=dcz(dcy,dcx) bvj[dcn[bsn][9]]=bvj[dcn[bsm][9]] local dda,ddb=bvj[dcn[bsm][10]],dcn[bsn][10];bvj[ddb+1]=dda;bvj[ddb]=dda[bsh[dcn[bso][10]]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvj[dcn[bsn][11]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvj[dcn[bsn][12]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvj[dcn[bsn][13]] bvj[dcn[bsn][14]]={} bvj[dcn[bsn][15]]=bsh[dcn[bsm][15]] bvj[dcn[bsn][16]][bvj[dcn[bsm][16]]]=bvj[dcn[bso][16]] bvj[dcn[bsn][17]]=bsh[dcn[bsm][17]] bvj[dcn[bsn][18]]={} bvj[dcn[bsn][19]][bvj[dcn[bsm][19]]]=bvj[dcn[bso][19]] bvj[dcn[bsn][20]]=bsh[dcn[bsm][20]] bvj[dcn[bsn][21]]=bvj[dcn[bsm][21]][bvj[dcn[bso][21]]] bvj[dcn[bsn][22]][bvj[dcn[bsm][22]]]=bvj[dcn[bso][22]] bvj[dcn[bsn][23]]=bsh[dcn[bsm][23]] bvj[dcn[bsn][24]][bvj[dcn[bsm][24]]]=bvj[dcn[bso][24]] bwc=bwc+1 bwa[bwc]=bvj[dcn[bsn][25]] local ddc=bwa[bwc] local ddd=bwa[bwc-1] local dde=bwa[bwc-brt[1][3][3]] local ddf=bwa[bwc-brt[1][92][10]] bwc=bwc-brt[1][39][3] ddf(dde,ddd,ddc) dcq=dcq+dcs end bvj[dco]=dcq bve=dcn[bsm][1] else while brt[1][70] do if bvd[bsm]~=brt[1][105][2] then local ddg=bse[bvj[bvd[bso]]] local ddh,ddi=ddg[bsm],ddg[bsn] ddg[bsn]=ddh ddg[bsm]=ddi bvd[bsm]=brt[1][105][2] end break end end end end else if bvk<=282 then if bvk<=280 then if bvk>=280 then local ddj=bvp local ddk=bwc local ddl=ddj+1 local ddm=bwa[ddl] bvj[bvd[bsn]]=ddm(brs:UNCE3(brt,bwa,ddl+1,ddk)) bwc=ddj local ddn=bvz[bvi] bvi=bvi-1 bvp=ddn or 0 else if bvk>=brt[1][59][4] then local ddo=bvd local ddp=ddo[bsn][1] local ddq=ddo[bso][1] local ddr,dds,ddt=bvj[ddp],bvj[ddp+1],bvj[ddp+brt[1][3][3]] while ddr>=dds do bvj[ddp]=ddr bvj[ddp+brt[1][92][10]]=ddr bvj[ddo[bsn][2]]=bsh[ddo[bsm][2]] bvj[ddo[bsn][3]]=bvj[ddo[bsm][3]]-bvj[ddo[bso][3]] bvj[ddo[bsn][4]]=bvj[ddo[bsm][4]]*bvj[ddo[bso][4]] bvj[ddo[bsn][5]]=bvj[ddo[bsm][5]]%bvj[ddo[bso][5]] bvj[ddo[bsn][6]]=bsh[ddo[bsm][6]] bvj[ddo[bsn][7]]=bvj[ddo[bsm][7]]+bvj[ddo[bso][7]] bvj[ddo[bsn][8]]=bvj[ddo[bsm][8]][bvj[ddo[bso][8]]] bvj[ddo[bsn][9]]=bvj[ddo[bsm][9]][bvj[ddo[bso][9]]] bvj[ddo[bsn][10]][bvj[ddo[bsm][10]]]=bvj[ddo[bso][10]] bvj[ddo[bsn][11]][bvj[ddo[bsm][11]]]=bvj[ddo[bso][11]] ddr=ddr+ddt end bvj[ddp]=ddr bve=ddo[bsm][1] else local ddu=bvd local ddv=ddu[bsn][1] local ddw=ddu[bso][1] local ddx,ddy,ddz=bvj[ddv],bvj[ddv+1],bvj[ddv+brt[1][3][3]] while ddx<=ddy do bvj[ddv]=ddx if not(((brt[1][112][2]) and(brt[1][75][3]))) then else bvj[ddv+brt[1][92][10]]=ddx end bvj[ddu[bsn][2]]=bvj[ddu[bsm][2]][bvj[ddu[bso][2]]] bvj[ddu[bsn][3]][bvj[ddu[bsm][3]]]=bvj[ddu[bso][3]] ddx=ddx+ddz end bvj[ddv]=ddx bve=ddu[bsm][1] end end else if bvk>=282 then local dea=bvp local deb=bwc local dec=dea+1 local ded=bwa[dec] do local dee,def,deg=ded(brs:UNCE3(brt,bwa,dec+1,deb)) bvj[bvd[bsn]]=dee bvj[bvd[bsn]+1]=def bvj[bvd[bsn]+brt[1][3][3]]=deg end bwc=dea local deh=bvz[bvi] bvi=bvi-1 bvp=deh or 0 else local dei=bsh[bvd[bsq]] local dej=bvj[bvd[bsn]] local dek=dej[dei] local del=bvu(bvt,dek(dej)) bvh=bvd[bsn]+del-1 for dem=1,del do bvj[bvd[bsn]+dem-1]=bvt[dem] end end end else if bvk>=285 then if bvk<=285 then local den=bvd[bsm] local deo=bwc local dep=deo-den+1 local deq=bwa[dep] bvj[bvd[bsn]]=deq(brs:UNCE3(brt,bwa,dep+1,deo)) bwc=dep-1 else bvj[bvd[bsn]]=bvj[bvd[bso]]<bvj[bvd[bsm]];end else if bvk>=brt[1][112][7] then bvj[bse[bve][bsn]]=bvj[bse[bve][bsm]]<bvj[bse[bve][bso]];else if bvj[bvd[bsn]]~=nil and bvj[bvd[bsn]]~=false then bve=bvd[bsm];end;end end end end end end else if bvk<=brt[1][113] then if bvk>=brt[1][23][1] then if bvk<=brt[1][55][1] then if bvk<=brt[1][7][2] then if bvk>=brt[1][5][4] then if bvk<=185 then if bvk<=brt[1][5][4] then bvf=bsh[bse[bve+brt[1][92][10]][bsm]] bvj[bvd[bsn]]=bsh[bvd[bsm]];else bvg=bsh[bse[bve+brt[1][3][3]][bsm]] bvj[bvd[bsn]]=bvf;end else if bvk<=186 then bvj[bvd[bsn]]=bvg;else while brt[1][60][1] do bvf=bsh[bse[bve+brt[1][92][10]][bsm]] break end bvj[bvd[bsn]]=bvj[bvd[bsm]]-bvj[bvd[bso]];end end else if bvk<=brt[1][24] then if bvk>=brt[1][24] then brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local der=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local des=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local det=des local deu=brv[det] bvj[der]=deu[1] else brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local dev=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local dew=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local dex=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) bvj[dev]=bvj[dew]-bvj[dex];end else if bvk<=brt[1][26][5] then brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local dey=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local dez=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local dfa=dez bvj[dey]=brv[dfa] else brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local dfb=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local dfc=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) bvj[dfb]=bvj[dfc];end end end else if bvk<=188 then bvj[bvd[bsn]]=bvf;else local dfd=#bvd[bsn];for dfe=1,dfd do bvj[bvd[bsn][dfe]]=bsh[bvd[bsm][dfe]];end end end else if bvk>=brt[1][73][3] then local dff=#bvd[bsn];for dfg=1,dff do bvj[bvd[bsn][dfg]]=bsh[bvd[bsm][dfg]];end else bvj[bvd[bsn]]=bsh[bvd[bsm]];end end else if bvk>=171 then if bvk>=176 then if bvk<=178 then brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local dfh=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local dfi=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local dfj=dfi bvj[dfh]=brv[dfj] else brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local dfk=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local dfl=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local dfm=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) bvj[dfk]=bvj[dfl][bvj[dfm]];end else if bvk>=brt[1][7][1] then brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local dfn=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local dfo=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local dfp=dfo local dfq=brv[dfp] bvj[dfn]=dfq[1] else if bvk<=brt[1][112][3] then brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local dfr=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local dfs=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local dft=dfs bvj[dfr]=brv[dft] else brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local dfu=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local dfv=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local dfw=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) bvj[dfu][bvj[dfv]]=bvj[dfw];end end end else if bvk<=brt[1][7][3] then if bvk>=164 then if bvk<=164 then brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local dfx=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local dfy=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local dfz=dfy bvj[dfx]=brv[dfz] else brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local dga=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local dgb=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local dgc=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) bvj[dga][bvj[dgb]]=bvj[dgc];end else if bvk<=brt[1][50][4] then brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local dgd=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local dge=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local dgf=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) bvj[dgd]=bvj[dge][bvj[dgf]];else brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local dgg=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local dgh=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local dgi=dgh brv[dgi][1]=bvj[dgg] end end else if bvk>=brt[1][112][5] then brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local dgj=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local dgk=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local dgl=dgk brv[dgl][1]=bvj[dgj] else if bvk<=167 then brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local dgm=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local dgn=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local dgo=dgn brv[dgo][1]=bvj[dgm] else brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local dgp=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local dgq=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local dgr=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) bvj[dgp]=bvj[dgq][bvj[dgr]];end end end end end else if bvk<=brt[1][60][8] then if bvk>=208 then if bvk<=211 then if bvk>=brt[1][35][2] then if bvk<=brt[1][35][2] then local dgs=bvd[bsn] local dgt=bvd[bsm] local dgu=bvd[bso] bvj[dgs[1]]=bsh[dgt[1]];bvj[dgs[2]]=bvj[dgt[2]]~=bvj[dgu[2]];else local dgv=bvd[bsn] local dgw=bvd[bsm] bvj[dgv[1]]=brw[bsh[dgw[1]]];bvj[dgv[2]]=bsh[dgw[2]];end else if bvk>=brt[1][4][4] then local dgx=bvd[bsn] local dgy=bvd[bsm] local dgz=bvd[bsq] bvj[dgx[1]]=bvj[dgy[1]];local dha=dgx[2] local dhb=bsh[dgz[2]] local dhc=bvj[dha] local dhd=dhc[dhb] bvj[dha]=dhd(dhc) else local dhe=bvd[bsn] local dhf=bvd[bsm] local dhg=bvd[bsq] bvj[dhe[1]]=bvj[dhf[1]];bvj[dhe[2]]=bsh[dhf[2]];local dhh=dhe[3] local dhi=bsh[dhg[3]] local dhj=bvj[dhh] bvj[dhh]=dhj[dhi](dhj,bvj[dhh+brt[1][3][3]]) end end else if bvk<=brt[1][15][2] then if bvk<=brt[1][109][3] then local dhk=bse[bve+1] local dhl=bse[bve+brt[1][3][3]] local dhm=bse[bve+brt[1][92][10]] bvj[bvd[bsn]]=brw[bsh[bvd[bsm]]];bvj[dhk[bsn]]=bsh[dhk[bsm]];bvj[dhl[bsn]]=bvj[dhl[bsm]][bvj[dhl[bso]]];bvj[dhm[bsn]]=brw[bsh[dhm[bsm]]];bve=bve+brt[1][92][10] else do for dhn=bwb,1,-1 do local dho=bvr[dhn] local dhp=bvq[dho] if dhp then local dhq=dhp[1] if dhq==0 then if dhp[2]==bvj then dhp[1]=1 dhp[2]={dhp[2][dhp[3]]} dhp[3]=1 end else if dhq==bvj then dhp[1]={dhp[1][dhp[2]]} dhp[2]=1 end end end bvq[dho]=nil bvr[dhn]=nil end bwb=0 local dhr=bwa[bwc] bwc=bwc-1 return dhr() end end else if bvk<=brt[1][4][5] then local dhs=bvd[bsn] local dht=bsh[bvd[bsq]] local dhu=bvj[dhs] bvj[dhs]=dhu[dht](dhu,brs:UNCE3(brt,bvj,dhs+brt[1][3][3],bvh)) else bvj[(bvd[bso]-bvd[bsq])][bvj[bvd[bsn]]]=bvj[(bvd[bsm]+bvd[bsq])];end end end else if bvk>=brt[1][116][3] then if bvk>=brt[1][109][7] then local dhv=bse[bve+1] bvj[bvd[bsn]]=nil;bvj[dhv[bsn]]=bvj[dhv[bsm]]~=bvj[dhv[bso]];bve=bve+1 else if bvk>=brt[1][75][5] then brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local dhw=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local dhx=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local dhy=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) bvj[dhw]=bvj[dhx][bvj[dhy]];else brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local dhz=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local dia=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local dib=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) bvj[dhz][bvj[dia]]=bvj[dib];end end else if bvk>=brt[1][75][1] then brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local dic=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local did=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local die=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) bvj[dic]=bvj[did][bvj[die]];else if bvk>=brt[1][105][6] then brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local dif=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local dig=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local dih=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) bvj[dif][bvj[dig]]=bvj[dih];else brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local dii=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local dij=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local dik=dij brv[dik][1]=bvj[dii] end end end end else if bvk>=225 then if bvk>=brt[1][51][1] then if bvk<=brt[1][43][2] then if bvk<=brt[1][51][1] then local dil=bse[bve+1] local dim=bse[bve+brt[1][3][3]] local din=bse[bve+brt[1][92][10]] bvj[bvd[bsn]]=brw[bsh[bvd[bsm]]];bvj[dil[bsn]]=bsh[dil[bsm]];bvj[dim[bsn]]=bvj[dim[bsm]][bvj[dim[bso]]];bvj[din[bsn]]=brw[bsh[din[bsm]]];bve=bve+brt[1][92][10] else brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local dio=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local dip=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) bvj[dio]=bvj[dip];end else brt[17]=bvd[bsq] local diq=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) local dir=brs:REA4(brt,brt[16]) bvj[diq]=-bvj[dir];end else if bvk<=brt[1][32] then if bvk>=brt[1][32] then local dis=bvd[bsn] bvo=bvj[dis[1]] bvo=#bvo bvj[dis[3]]=bvo bvj[dis[4]]={};else local dit,diu=bvd[bsn],(bvd[bso]*brt[1][13][5]) local div=bvj[dit] do local diw,dix,diy=bvj[dit+1],bvj[dit+brt[1][3][3]],bvj[dit+brt[1][92][10]] div[diu+1]=diw div[diu+brt[1][3][3]]=dix div[diu+brt[1][92][10]]=diy end end else if bvk<=brt[1][95][1] then local diz=bse[bve+1] bvj[bvd[bsn]]=bsh[bvd[bsm]];bvj[diz[bsn]]=bvj[diz[bsm]]>bvj[diz[bso]];bve=bve+1 else local dja=bse[bve+1] local djb=bse[bve+brt[1][3][3]] local djc=brs:BIAC3(brt,bvd[bsm],bve+225) local djd=brs:BIAC3(brt,dja[bsm],djc) bvj[bvd[bsn]]=bsh[bvd[bsm]];bvj[dja[bsn]]=bvj[djd];bvj[djb[bsn]]=bsh[djb[bsm]];bve=bve+brt[1][3][3] end end end else if bvk<=brt[1][105][1] then if bvk<=brt[1][75][6] then if bvk>=brt[1][75][6] then local dje=bsi[bvd[bsq]] local djf=bwa[bwc-dje[1]] bwc=bwc-1 djf() else if bvk<=216 then bvj[bvd[bsn]][bvj[bvd[bsm]]]=bvj[(bvd[bso]+bvd[bsq])];else local djg=bvd[bsm] local djh=bvd[bso] local dji=bvd[bsq] local djj=bvj[djg] local djk=bvj[djh] local djl=bvj[dji] djj(djk,djl) end end else if bvk>=brt[1][105][1] then bvj[bvd[bsn]]=brs:BIC4B(brt,bvj[bvd[bsm]],bvj[bvd[bso]]);else local djm=bsi[bvd[bsq]] local djn=djm[1]-1 local djo=bwa[bwc] local djp=bwa[bwc-1] local djq=bwa[bwc-brt[1][3][3]] bwc=bwc-brt[1][92][10] bvj[djn]=djq(djp,djo) end end else if bvk>=223 then if bvk>=brt[1][80] then bvj[(bvd[bsn]-bvd[bsq])]=#bvj[bvd[bsm]];else bvj[bvd[bsn]]=brs:BF01(brt,bvj[bvd[bsm]],bvj[bvd[bso]]);end else if bvk>=brt[1][84] then bvj[(bvd[bsn]-bvd[bsq])]=bvj[brs:BIAC3(brt,bvd[bsm],brs:BIAC3(brt,bse[bve-1][bsm],(bve+bvd[bsq])))]+bvj[bvd[bso]];else bvj[(bvd[bsn]-bvd[bsq])]=bvj[bvd[bsm]][bvj[bvd[bso]]];end end end end end end end end bve=bve+1;end;end;else bsb=0 brx=639592 end end until brx==482314 end,OL237=function(djr,djs,djt,dju,djv,djw) local djx,djy,djz,dka,dkb,dkc,dkd,dke,dkf,dkg,dkh djy={}
